faqs.question: Do students get their ROI after completing M.Tech from Amal Jyothi College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: First let me explain that ROI stands for return of Investment.Students do get their ROI after completing M.Tech from Amal Jyothi college of Engineering but it depends on certain factors like fees, the job market demand and salary potential for M.Tech students, the quality of education provided, the connection and networking opportunities provided by the college it even depends upon the location of the college.A student need to research all the factors and should see for long term benefits.I would suggest to take feedback from seniors and ask about their experiences.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
AJCE offers over 34 courses at UG, PG and PhD level across four streams. BTech and MCA are the top AJCE courses. BTech is a four-year course offered in 10 specialisations. Besides, BTech lateral entry of a three-year duration is also offered by the college. MTech and MCA are PG courses offered for a duration of two-year each. Five-year integrated MCA and two-year MCA Lateral Entry is also offered by the college. The programmes include industrial training and projects.

Additionally, add-on courses, namely Data Science, Search Engine Optimization, etc., bridge courses and IT academy certification are short-term courses offered by the college under MCA. Below-mentioned are the courses offered by AJCE:

faqs.answer: A:    Hi. M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at Amal Jyothi is a 2 years course offered at the PG level. To get admitted to the M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering course at Amal Jyothi, applicants must meet the entry requirements - 60.0% in graduation. The total tuition fee for Amal Jyothi M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering is INR 120000. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of - INR 7550, and a hostel fee of amount INR 45300 that students are required to pay. Thanks
faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Tech at Amal Jyothi College of Engineering - AJCE?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you are eligible for BCA and MCA programme at Amal jyothi college of Engineering. This is 5 year programme and for this students don't need to give any entrance exam but for B.Tech course, first you have to give an entrance exam, JEE/KEAM for getting admission at Amal jyothi college of Engineering.
faqs.question: Can I get into Amal Jyothi College of Engineering with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. KEAM result can be checked in the online mode only on the official website. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below: Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.
faqs.question: What are the details required to check the KEAM result?

faqs.answer: A:    Amal Jyothi College of Engineering is one of the best engineering colleges in Kerala. Amal Jyothi College of Engineering provides admission to various engineering programs which include B.Tech, M.Tech and MCA.Yes, you can get admission to Amal Jyothi College of Engineering for B.Tech with 60% in class 12th because minimum percentage required is 50%. Candidate also have to clear GATE Engineering entrance examination and obtain 50% marks for admission in B.Tech.B.Tech offers admission in 9 courses with 780 seats. For admission, candidates have to obtain 50% in their recognised board and must have a clear KEAM engineering entrance examination. It was conducted by the government of Kerala. NRI candidates also have the same eligibility criteria, except they have obtained 50% marks in mathematics.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I would give a 4-star rating for Amal Jyothi College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Cyber Security has been newly introduced in Amal Jyothi College of Engineering. I am a first-year cyber student, and the first batch of Cyber Security is currently in 2nd year. So no batch has graduated yet. Upon searching, I got to know that cyber comes under CS, so the company recruitments would be the same as those of other CS branches. Most of the students of CS are getting placed at Infosys, UST Global, Wipro, and Spyder. These companies would recruit Cyber students. Salary packages are seen to be around the lowest 2 LPA to the highest being 12 LPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The organization is in Kanjirappally.

review_content.Placements: The highest and average packages offered in our course were 7.5 LPA and above for high packages. 3 to 3.5 LPA for low or moderate packages. Specific companies, Cognizant, HCL, and IBM. They were the highly paying companies, based on the specific criteria of the candidates.
review_content.Infrastructure: The organization had phenomenal internal arrangements to satisfy the students. Visitors were not allowed inside the organization without proper notice or prior intimation. The classrooms were well-ventilated. The intake of courses in various departments was average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great infrastructure, amazing festivals, supportive hostel life, but slightly high fees.

review_content.Placements: I'm actually a 2nd year student, but in the previous year of seniors, the eligible students got 100% placement. And in terms of me, my senior batch, that means 3rd years, they are the first autonomous batch. So when we pass out, it's gonna be a different story since we'll be autonomous students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of course infrastructure, we do have a department building. The left side belongs to IT & AD (one department only), and the right side belongs to CSE. We got 4 labs and only 1 is air-conditioned, whereas for CSE, all 4 are AC. We don't have classrooms in the department building, only staff rooms and labs. Classes are in another building. There is a library and super-speed Wi-Fi, with an average of around 50 Mbps and up to 700 Mbps. In terms of the hostel, it's the best with sports facilities, 20 Mbps Wi-Fi, and daily non-veg.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, supportive faculty, and excellent campus life.

review_content.Placements: At Amal Jyothi College of Engineering, around 75-80 percent of students got placed in reputed companies. The highest package is about 12 LPA, the lowest is around 3 LPA and the average is 4 LPA-5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, UST Global, and Bosch. Nearly 60 percent of students secured internships in companies like TCS, Infosys, Bosch, and startups, with roles such as software engineer, data analyst, and developer being the most offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Amal Jyothi College of Engineering provides well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a rich library that support academic needs. The hostel facilities are good with clean rooms, study areas, and 24/7 Wi-Fi. The mess and canteen serve decent food with multiple options, and there are medical facilities with doctors on call. The campus also offers excellent sports grounds, indoor games, and gym facilities, making both academics and campus life well-balanced.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If you are joining computer department application, then you are welcome.

review_content.Placements: Here we are the 1st batch of BCA. College is very famous, wherever I go they all talk about Amal Jyothi. But they don't know the real MCA department. Placement is very good. Sometimes big company HR or someone comes to our lab and analyzes, that's a feel. It's like we are going to be someone.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is very good. The rooms are well-maintained. The service is also excellent. However, triple-sharing rooms have glass doors, which affects privacy and is not a suitable choice for students. Replacing them would improve comfort. We have good friends and a good life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities, placements, faculty, and overall nice.

review_content.Placements: Many companies are coming to the college, and the number of students who are getting placed is less because most of the students fail in the interview. Those students with only skills are placed in many famous companies like TCS, Infosys etc. They are coming, but students with skills are placed. I think 15 LPA was last year's highest package. If you study hard and develop more skills, you can get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the college are nice. The Wi-Fi availability, classrooms, and library are good and well-maintained, as my friends say the hostel quality is also very nice. But in some labs the machines are damaged, which I think is a bad thing, and otherwise everything is good.

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about Amal Jyothi College of Engineering - AJCE?
overview_faqs.answer: The facilities and general maintenance of the college are really good. Additionally, it offers helpful placement assistance. AJCE has the following distinctive qualities: Affiliation: AJCE is accredited by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and is associated with APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University in Kottayam. Six of AJCE's programs have received accreditation from the National Board of Accreditation (NBA), New Delhi. Infrastructure: At the foot of the Western Ghats, on 60 acres of picturesque terrain, AJCE boasts a sizable campus. It features a fully equipped library that spans three stories and 30,000 square feet. Its library contains 951 titles and 32,000 book volumes. It subscribes to 106 printed journals, both domestic and foreign.

admission_process.title: AJCE Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amal Jyothi College of Engineeringoffers 34 courses at the UG, PG and PhD levels across four streams. Aspirants can pursue BTech at the UG level and MTech and MCA at the PG level. Besides, add-on courses like GATE coaching, foreign language courses, CAD training, etc., are also offered by AJCE. Admission to all the UG, PG and PhD courses will be based on the merit of the candidates in the accepted national or state-level entrance exam or last qualification, followed by counselling.

Registration for BTech, MTech, and MCA courses is closed. The college accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, GATE, and others to offer admission to UG and PG courses. Below-mentioned are the HBTU courses along with their eligibility criteria and respective fees:
Course Name
Entrance Exam/ Eligibility
Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate in PCM
KEAM/JEE Main
MCA (Regular)
Pass BCA or a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science Engineering
LBS MCA Entrance exam
Graduation with a minimum of 60% aggregate (54% aggregate for SEBC students)
GATEand AMIE/AMIETE
Master’s degree with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 (5.5 CGPA for SC/ ST/ differently-abled)
UGC-NET/CSIR-NET
*In the absence of complete fee details, the above fee is given for the general category, government, NRI and management quota as per the availability and is indicated in the table.

faqs.question: Does Amal Jyothi College of Engineering accept GATE score ?
faqs.answer: For MTech admission is based on GATE score and also the Kerala government conducts an exam called Kerala Engineering and Medical.Amal Jyoti College of Engineering cutoff is checked after the third round of the exam. Considering Amal Jyothi college of Engineering last year cutoff of the exam Kerala Engineering and Medical it was between 57105 to 335189. GATE score is considered bascically for PHD admissions.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amal Jyothi Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Institute provides two campus hostels, Santhom for boys and Amala for girls, are taken care of by dedicated Catholic Priests and Nuns. There is telephonic access to all rooms and 1.34Gpbs WiFi Connectivity inside the hostel. Affectionate discipline, tasty food at moderate rates and neat rooms with modern sanitation and professional laundry services are the hallmarks of the hostels.

library.description: The total collection of the Central Library is above 45,000 and it is segregated into various sections as per Dewey Decimal Classification for the convenience of organization and reader’s services. The OPAC searching facility helps the user community to identify and locate a particular title as per their interest. In this collection about 2,509 CD-ROMs are available. The central library users have online access to more than 1000 full-text e-journals and conference proceedings.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court

reviews.review_heading: I would give a 4-star rating for Amal Jyothi College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Here we have good infrastructure, Wi-Fi all around the campus as well as the hostel, a decent library, and labs for every branch. The hostel is actually strict, so good discipline is maintained. A variety of foods are available in the canteen, which is made here only. Mess food is also good; it is adjustable.

reviews.review_heading: The organization is in Kanjirappally.
reviews.review_text: The organization had phenomenal internal arrangements to satisfy the students. Visitors were not allowed inside the organization without proper notice or prior intimation. The classrooms were well-ventilated. The intake of courses in various departments was average.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, amazing festivals, supportive hostel life, but slightly high fees.
reviews.review_text: In terms of course infrastructure, we do have a department building. The left side belongs to IT & AD (one department only), and the right side belongs to CSE. We got 4 labs and only 1 is air-conditioned, whereas for CSE, all 4 are AC. We don't have classrooms in the department building, only staff rooms and labs. Classes are in another building. There is a library and super-speed Wi-Fi, with an average of around 50 Mbps and up to 700 Mbps. In terms of the hostel, it's the best with sports facil...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and excellent campus life.
reviews.review_text: Amal Jyothi College of Engineering provides well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a rich library that support academic needs. The hostel facilities are good with clean rooms, study areas, and 24/7 Wi-Fi. The mess and canteen serve decent food with multiple options, and there are medical facilities with doctors on call. The campus also offers excellent sports grounds, indoor games, and gym facilities, making both academics and campus life well-balanced.

reviews.review_heading: If you are joining computer department application, then you are welcome.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is very good. The rooms are well-maintained. The service is also excellent. However, triple-sharing rooms have glass doors, which affects privacy and is not a suitable choice for students. Replacing them would improve comfort. We have good friends and a good life.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, placements, faculty, and overall nice.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are nice. The Wi-Fi availability, classrooms, and library are good and well-maintained, as my friends say the hostel quality is also very nice. But in some labs the machines are damaged, which I think is a bad thing, and otherwise everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate hostel for both boys and girls. Most of the rooms are on a 3-sharing basis. Double and single rooms are also available in small numbers. Hostels are very neat, clean, and well-maintained. Rooms are cleaned occasionally. Bathrooms are cleaned every day. Mess food is also good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure were available to us during the course. The food was good during that time, but the warden was too strict.

reviews.review_heading: Santhome boys story of life.
reviews.review_text: The structure of the course is good but not that great due to the fewer practical sessions we receive. We are not company ready after our courses. The infrastructure is top-notch here but most students blindly took admission just because of the infrastructure. Hostel food is bad, to be honest. The menu changes every month but still not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a beautiful college and offers great opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our department has all facilities including classrooms with smart boards, a department library including all books required for our course, and labs for each semester. The entire college has access to Wi-Fi. I have stayed at the hostel for 2 years and my experience there was above average. I would only complain about the food because I was not able to adjust to that.

reviews.review_heading: My college life at Amal Jyothi.
reviews.review_text: There are labs in every semester. The lab facility is very good. There are plenty of machines for studying. There are separate libraries for every department in the college. The hostel rooms and bathrooms are clean; however, the hostel food is very bad. Plenty of sports activities are available for both boys and girls. A gym facility is also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good colleges to study.
reviews.review_text: This college provides well-equipped labs with the latest technologies, which helps the students to gain more practical skills. A huge library with lots of referrals is provided, which opens a massive world to the students. The classrooms are equipped with smart boards for much quality education.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for MCA courses.
reviews.review_text: Labs have the best facilities like high-speed internet for every student. The food is of excellent quality and is prepared in the college kitchen. The college has well-equipped computer labs and advanced classrooms. The college has facilities like a football court and basketball court. We have trained teams for every sport. We have medical facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Excellence campus, excellent hostel. The only drawback is that food quality is average.
reviews.review_text: Amal Jyothi College of Engineering has a good infrastructure and facilities. It has a well-equipped gym, a department library, and well-equipped laboratories. The classrooms have large computer screens like smartclass. The hostel is one of the best hostels with good infrastructure compared to other engineering colleges. The food has different varieties and the quality is average. The campus and hostel are very clean and green. The college promotes games like football, cricket, badminton, basketb...

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers good facilities and the infrastructure is also very good. Our college is one of the best among any college in Kerala. Hostel is good, with a canteen which serves best dishes. We have a lot of sports activities like football, cricket, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and some indoor games. There are many prizes for those who participate in inter-college competitions.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Amal Jyothi College of Engineering

There are placements for computer science, electronics and communication, information technology, and electrical engineering students.

paragraphs: Amal Jyothi College of Engineering is the best college in Kerala which provides admission in various courses which includes B.Tech, M.Tech and MCA programs.

First let me explain that ROI stands for return of Investment.Students do get their ROI after completing M.Tech from Amal Jyothi college of Engineering but it depends on certain factors like fees, the job market demand and salary potential for M.Tech students, the quality of education provided, the connection and networking opportunities provided by the college it even depends upon the location of the college.A student need to research all the factors and should see for long term benefits.I would suggest to take feedback from seniors and ask about their experiences.

Hi. M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at Amal Jyothi is a 2 years course offered at the PG level. To get admitted to the M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering course at Amal Jyothi, applicants must meet the entry requirements - 60.0% in graduation. The total tuition fee for Amal Jyothi M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering is INR 120000. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of - INR 7550, and a hostel fee of amount INR 45300 that students are required to pay.

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of an undergraduate degree ranges from 75,000 to 350,000. A postgraduate programme costs between 50,000 and 250,000. The cost of tuition varies greatly throughout ADYPU's programmes. The cost of undergraduate engineering programmes is often higher than that of business or humanities programmes. Different fees may apply to several specialisations within the same programme due to differences in industry requirements and available resources.ADYPU has several campuses spread out throughout Maharashtra; however, due to differences in infrastructure and everyday expenses, fees may change slightly between campuses. The total cost may increase in the event of extra costs such as semester, registration, exam, and so on. ADYPU provides a range of financial aid alternatives and scholarships to assist students in covering programme expenses.

ADYPU provides a range of financial aid alternatives and scholarships to assist students in covering programme expenses.

review_summary.college_name: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Full-stack Development - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students dream.

content.Placements: In my course, in the last pass-out batch around 10 to 15 students get placed. The highest package is 19 LPA, the lowest is 3.2 LPA, and the average is around 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are KPMG, Infosys, Teach Mahindra, and more. Many students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Digital classrooms are available. Labs are not for my course because they provide laptops to all students and take labs in classroom. High-speed Wi-Fi internet provided to each classroom. The library is available on our campus. Facilities in hostel is average but PG are available around college. Around 4-5 canteens in campus. Indoor and outdoor games and ground also available.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Pune.

content.Placements: Overall, the placement cell of this college is good. I completed my undergraduate degree, a BBA, and got an 8 LPA job at TCS. Before that, I did a six-month internship provided by this college with the best amenities. I like the culture of the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is also good, with three canteens available, which provide hygienic and delicious food. Hostel living might be costly, but they provide all materials, like a study table, a lamp, a cupboard, a pillow, and a blanket, so it is worth the money.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Full-stack Development - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: ADYPU is the best engineering college.

content.Placements: The highest package is 7 LPA and the average package is 4 LPA. But it is not giving a proper internship to students and also not satisfying job/placements but the campus was good and the environment was super cool. The campus was a great place to learn and achieve something in university.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is perfect; labs, classrooms and libraries are there. It has four canteens, and each canteen is separate for each department. There is a partition of hostels in the university, and the management and school of engineering hostels are different.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Full-stack Development - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with faculty and curriculum.

content.Placements: Placements :- as sunstone is launched here a year ago, there are no records of placements previously. But teachers are very straight forward about it they say if you study properly they will bring placements to you maximum would be like 10-12 LPA. Average would be 3-4 LPA. As per the teacher everyone will be placed in this course. Top companies are :- amazon, microsoft, infosis and many others they also provide international placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are digital. Every day we have to carry laptops. Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus. Speed of Wi-Fi is high. There are library in each floor. Hostel :- there are three types of hostels. 80000 one, 130000, 180000 each of these differ in having great rooms. Wi-Fi is unlimited in the hostel electricity is unlimited. Room from 130000 have tv, fridge and ovan in rooms.

individual_reviews.course: MCA in Web App Development - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of the Master of Computer Application at DY Patil.

content.Placements: Placement is very good in this college; they provide a minimum of INR 4 lakh per year package, and the highest placement in colleges in the field of MCA is around INR 30 lakh per year, which is the highest of the college placements. Campus placement is very good, and most IT companies come.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college campus is very good, even in that they provide all the facilities required for students. The campus has very good Wi-Fi, high-speed internet, and overall a smart library that is fully digital.

admission_process.title: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone admission 2025is currently ongoing for its programmes. Students seeking admission into the institute need to fulfil the admission criteria as set by the university. Students can pursue programmes at undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the fields of Management, Computer Application, etc. Also known asADYPU, the mode of application at the university commences online. Candidates need to go through Sunstone Screening (Test and Interview) to get selected. Some of the courses offered at the university are BTech, BCA, and MBA. Aspirants can read the following article to know all about the programmes and their respective admission criteria and procedures atAjeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone.

Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone course admissionis subject to clearance of the preset admission criteria of the desired programme. The university accepts students based on their performance in the selection rounds. Students looking to join the UG courses need to pass Class 12 or equivalent with relevant subjects. Similarly, for PG admissions, students need to complete graduation in the relevant field. The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forAjeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone courses:

AjeenkyaDY Patil University Powered by Sunstone admission processis a multi-step procedure that involves application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students can follow the step-by-step Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone admission procedure explained below:
Step 1: Application Process
The application process for Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone is completely online. Interested students can apply for the desired programme at (https://sunstone.in/).
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are selected based on their performance in the Sunstone Screening which includes test and interview. Students need to clear the basic eligibility of the desired programme along with clearing the test and then appearing for the subsequent round of interview.
Step 3: Document Verification and Admission Confirmation

After the completion of the selection rounds, students must provide the original copies of the documents. Once an admission offer is made, students need to accept the offer to start their journey at the university.

placement_data.title: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: During the 2025 placements, the University hosted a panel of over 1,200 recruiters. More than 150 job profiles were offered. INR 26 lakh per annum was the highest salary package offered to the students. The average package offered stood at INR 4.6 LPA .

The University provides more than 20 advanced certifications to expand horizons. Alongside this, the students undergo immersive internship projects in top companies for more than 8 months . Comparing the placement stats with other top-tier PVT colleges, the Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone witnessed the participation of seven times more recruiters.

The placements in 2025 recorded a 63% higher return of investment. Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) offers students access to 200+ assured placement opportunities, or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements don’t meet the commitment. To be eligible for POP, students must maintain a minimum average attendance of 70% across all credit and non-credit classes in every semester. Lastly, students must strictly adhere to the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program.

hostel_campus.college_name: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Powered by Sunstone Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students dream.
reviews.review_text: Digital classrooms are available. Labs are not for my course because they provide laptops to all students and take labs in classroom. High-speed Wi-Fi internet provided to each classroom. The library is available on our campus. Facilities in hostel is average but PG are available around college. Around 4-5 canteens in campus. Indoor and outdoor games and ground also available.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is also good, with three canteens available, which provide hygienic and delicious food. Hostel living might be costly, but they provide all materials, like a study table, a lamp, a cupboard, a pillow, and a blanket, so it is worth the money.

reviews.review_heading: ADYPU is the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is perfect; labs, classrooms and libraries are there. It has four canteens, and each canteen is separate for each department. There is a partition of hostels in the university, and the management and school of engineering hostels are different.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with faculty and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are digital. Every day we have to carry laptops. Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus. Speed of Wi-Fi is high. There are library in each floor. Hostel :- there are three types of hostels. 80000 one,  130000,  180000 each of these differ in having great rooms. Wi-Fi is unlimited in the hostel electricity is unlimited. Room from 130000 have tv, fridge and ovan in rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Master of Computer Application at DY Patil.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college campus is very good, even in that they provide all the facilities required for students. The campus has very good Wi-Fi, high-speed internet, and overall a smart library that is fully digital.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really a very good place for graduation.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good, and Wi-Fi. It also has good stability. The canteen has very tasty food. There are many canteens on the campus, as well as right beside the college. All labs are also well developed. Infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied because of faculty, good placements, and really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good but good enough to accommodate 40–50 students. Wi-Fi sometimes doesn’t work, and the smart TV also occasionally malfunctions. The hostel rooms are very good and the hostel is divided into four different floors. You get a room based on the amount you are paying, and Wi-Fi facility in the hostel always works at high speed.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and student life.
reviews.review_text: Classes are good with AC, digital boards, and well decored classes. Wi-Fi is good, and library is not that good. Hostel facility is available in the university. Hostel is good. There are three types of hostel sharing, 4 sharing, 3 sharing, and 2 sharing, and their prices range from 1,00,000 to 2,10,000.

individual_reviews.title: Place for placement VSB Engineering College.

content.Placements: Each student gets 2-4 offers from various companies, and the placement is 100 percent. There are many companies that take students from our college, and last time the company Capgemini took over more than 700 students from VSB Engineering College located in Karur.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good infrastructure in hostels. They provide routers for students to use free Wi-Fi. In the hostel, they provide a bed with bedsheets for each student and cupboards with blocks, and the routine is different from other colleges. There are strict rules for the hostel that everyone should follow.

individual_reviews.title: Decent academy support with a good campus, but needs more practical exposure.

Top recruiters include NGOs, media houses, and educational firms. Around 50% of students got internships in companies like Tech for India, Times Group, and local startups. Common roles include content writers, research assistants, and HR trainees.

Overall, the infrastructure is decent and supports both academics and student life well.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at VSB Engineering College?
faqs.answer: The college offers BTech and M.Tech course. A total of 1,170 seats are offered for BTech and 63 seats are offered for M.Tech course. faqs.question: My TNEA cutoff is 30,000. Can I get admission to ECE at VSB Engineering College?
faqs.answer: VSB Engineering College accepts valid TNEA scores for admission to the BE/BTech courses, followed by counselling rounds. The TNEA Round 1 cutoff has been released, wherein the closing ranks ranged between10431and26436for the students belonging to the General AI category. The Round 1 cutoff for the ECE course stood at 26436. So, considering the TNEA 2024 cutoff, candidates with a rank of 30000 are not eligible to get into VSB Engineering College for ECE in Round 1. Candidates can wait for the next round, as the cutoffs vary for each round and category.

hostel_campus.college_name: VSB Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostel facilities are available for boys and girls. Tidy rooms and hygienic facilities make for an ideal stay away from home ambience. The hostels also have a recreation hall, multi-gym facility and provision for a variety of indoor games for the students.Students in the hostels have access to everyday conveniences including telephones and enjoy the luxury of watching a film every weekend.The mess facilities in the hostels are designed to meet international hygiene standards. Steam cookers and sterilised equipment are used to prepare wholesome, healthy food.A mineral water plant is operated within the campus and has a well-maintained RO facility. This water is used for cooking, drinking and is available throughout the campus.

library.description: V.S.B. Central Library caters to the information needs of the institute’s faculty, students, staff and researchers. It houses around 40,000 books covering all disciplines of engineering, technology, and management. The collection in the library comprises printed documents such as books, reports, thesis, standards, atlases, patents and journal back volumes. The non-book collections include materials like audio/video cassettes, and CDROM discs. There are Slide Projectors and other allied equipments in the Audio – Visual library. Under the web consortium, the library provides on-line access to a large number of full-text journal databases from various publishers. These e-journals are accessible on intranet to campus users only.The library provides various services for its members such as lending of books and journal back volumes, reservation of books, inter-library loan, document delivery, photocopying, CDROM, Internet services and video screening. All the library activities are computerized, including bar-coded ID cards and separate On-line Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) terminals for searching books in the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball Court, Ball Badminton Court, Kabbadi Court, Kho- Kho Court, Throwball Court, 200 Meter Track for Running

reviews.review_heading: Place for placement VSB Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure in hostels. They provide routers for students to use free Wi-Fi. In the hostel, they provide a bed with bedsheets for each student and cupboards with blocks, and the routine is different from other colleges. There are strict rules for the hostel that everyone should follow.

reviews.review_heading: Decent academy support with a good campus, but needs more practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study material. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average, while the canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage student recreation. Overall, the infrastructure...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, and we have another branch in Coimbatore. The hostel facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are neat and comfortable. Food is average, but we manage well with canteens inside the campus. The dental block inside the college helps students access basic medical facilities when needed. Overall, the infrastructure is good. The classrooms are clean and well-maintained. Labs are well-equipped with proper electrical instruments. The library has plenty of useful books, and students can access it anytime.

reviews.review_heading: Well qualified faculty members and encouraging.
reviews.review_text: Our college has provided facilities and infrastructure. Everyone can use the internet. It has a huge central library. Classrooms are good, clean, and hygienic. The labs are good. Hostel facilities for both girls and boys are good, and the food served is good. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a peaceful and friendly environment with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good hostel with faculty members on each floor and separate janitors on each floor, which makes it clean. They are very good without any disappointments. They make sure to meet every aspect of students and make sure students are comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: VSB Engineering College has good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: VSB Engineering College's infrastructure and facilities are excellent. This college has more departments. All classrooms are more comfortable for all students. Multiple computer laboratories are available in this college. This college provides good hostel facilities. The hostel food quality is very good. Multiple sports grounds are also there in this college. Emergency medical facilities are available here. There is a well-stocked library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: A place for placement, good infrastructure, green campus.
reviews.review_text: Yes, the Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very neat and spacious. Hostel facilities are also good, and the mess has tasty food and good water facilities. The canteen is also neat and has good food facilities. Sports and games are also happening nicely, with many competitions taking place at both state and national levels.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are friendly and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The classrooms look very beautiful with AC. The library is good, and many books are available. We have a tennis court at our college. The college provides good hostel facilities. The canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: VSB Engineering College is the place for placement.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms have smart boards with 75-inch displays. In my college surroundings, both the hostel and classrooms have high-speed internet Wi-Fi. Different dishes are available in the canteen every day. The hostel food has different varieties based on the days, with non-veg provided twice a week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: In our department, every classroom is neat and has a smart mirror and high-speed Wi-Fi. The department helps to learn without any distractions. Our college consists of a library where there are more than 70,000 books. It has high-speed Wi-Fi. Its speed is 10 Kbs.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: There is the best infrastructure for hostels. There is a Wi-Fi feature available all over the college with high speed. There is a well-prepared lab for each department separately in our college. Each classroom has a digital board where students can learn with very ease. And finally, the best is our library, which contains most of the books on all topics. The quality and taste of food are best in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: VSB Engineering College is an Absolutely Good College.
reviews.review_text: The campus environment at VSB Engineering College is very beautiful. Full campus CCTV coverage and Wi-Fi network facilities are available, so no one can move without permission. The college library facility is very good. Separate hostel facilities are available for boys and girls, and the hostel food tastes good. Some medical facilities are also available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: College provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is good. The classrooms are in good condition and the facilities are very good. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is a lab for every subject. There are many computers in all the labs, all of which are air-conditioned. The hostel provides good food. We have a beautiful mess.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements are available in our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. There are separate departments for each block with separate classrooms available. Labs are equipped with new equipment. The library is provided. The facilities available in our hostel are good because they provide food, electricity, Wi-Fi, and rooms. Even our college conducts sports and games for every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for campus placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a 193-acre large campus with 18 student residences, faculty residences, an academic block, a library, 3 mess halls, 2 gymnasiums, 2 sports stadiums, and numerous gardens with exotic flowers. The internet connectivity is decent within the campus, but the network speed is comparatively slower.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies are TCS, Capgemini, Wipro, Cognizant, Virtusa, and DXC Technologies.
Many students got placed in many companies from our batch compared to passing out batch.

highlights.summary:
The CSAB Special Counselling 2025 Round 3 has concluded with the announcement of the seat allotment results for IIIT Agartala - Indian Institute of Information Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: As per the Shiksha verified reviews, IIIIT Agartala has been rated 4.0 for Placements and Value for Money criteria, respectively. The institute offers BTech in only one specialisation, i.e. Computer Science and Engineering. It offers a 4 years full-time programme with an annual seat intake of 70 students. The eligibility criteria include merit along with entrance scores. Candidates must secure 75% of the minimum aggregate in Class 12 and appear for JEE Main and secure a seat through JoSaa and CSAB counselling. The Institute offers BTech in CSE with a tuition fee of INR 8 Lakh along with a one-time payment of INR 11.2K. reviews_list.review_title: Something about IIIT Agartala.

review_content.Placements: I am in my first year, so I don't know much about it. But in my counselling time, I researched our college and found out that a student got a 1.15 crore package. And at that time, our institute was showing 22 lacs as an average package.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our IIITA runs on the NIT Agartala campus. So we have access to whatever is present on the NITA campus. We have here in labs, classrooms, hostels, libraries, etc. We have medical facilities, and we have good sports as well. Mess food is not good in the first year.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities. In 2022 the highest international package was 1.15 crores per annum and the highest domestic package was 45 LPA. Median package was 10.5 LPA. In 2022 100% of the students got placed. The top recruiting companies are AI palette, Amazon, Capgemini, Deloitte, Indiamart, ITC etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Permanent campus of IIIT Agartala is still under construction. Currently all IIIT Agartala students are alloted hostels in NIT Agartala and classes are also same for first year. From second year there is seperate building for IIIT Agartala classes. All facilities are same as of NIT Agartala. Sports complex, Hostels, Campus etc. Are same for both.

faqs.answer: IIIT Agartala, also known as the Indian Institute of Information Technology, is a renowned institution that offers BTech programs. The faculty at IIIT-Agartala are highly experienced and deliver quality education. review_summary.college_name: IIIT Agartala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Growing institute with strong placements and NIT Agartala campus benefits.

content.Placements: IIIT Agartala has shown promising placement results recently. Around 85%-90% of students from our course got placed. The highest package is 60 LPA. The average package is 18.33 LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, Inframarket, and LinkedIn, offering both technical and managerial roles. Nearly 70% of students got internships, mainly in LinkedIn, Amazon, Inframarket, and a few startups. The top roles offered include software development engineer (SDE), business analyst, and data engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Since IIIT Agartala is functioning from NIT Agartala's campus, we have access to all its infrastructure. The academic buildings have Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, modern labs, and a well-stocked central library. The hostels are well-maintained with Wi-Fi access (2GB/day), water filters, laundry machines, and clean washrooms. There are 5 messes, including first-year mess, south, north, veg, and girls' mess, with decent food quality. Campus also has a medical center, 600-acre green surroundings, a sports complex, gym, and canteens.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Indian institute of information technology.

content.Placements: 80% to 90% of students get placed from this college every year. The highest package is 45 LPA, the average package is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Google, Amazon, Flipkart, PhonePe, Paytm, TCS, Infosys, etc. Almost all students get internships from my college, but those who are not studying anything do not receive any kind of scholarship.
content.Infrastructure: Buildings that are already constructed in the college are fine, but much more construction work is yet to be completed. Mess food is okay; it's not excellent, but you can manage with it. In the hostel, there are two B.Ed rooms for two students, and attached toilets and bathrooms are not available. No single rooms are provided. Medical, sports, and other game facilities are available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Something about IIIT Agartala.

content.Placements: I am in my first year, so I don't know much about it. But in my counselling time, I researched our college and found out that a student got a 1.15 crore package. And at that time, our institute was showing 22 lacs as an average package.
content.Infrastructure: Our IIITA runs on the NIT Agartala campus. So we have access to whatever is present on the NITA campus. We have here in labs, classrooms, hostels, libraries, etc. We have medical facilities, and we have good sports as well. Mess food is not good in the first year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college for placements.

content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities. In 2022 the highest international package was 1.15 crores per annum and the highest domestic package was 45 LPA. Median package was 10.5 LPA. In 2022 100% of the students got placed. The top recruiting companies are AI palette, Amazon, Capgemini, Deloitte, Indiamart, ITC etc.
content.Infrastructure: Permanent campus of IIIT Agartala is still under construction. Currently all IIIT Agartala students are alloted hostels in NIT Agartala and classes are also same for first year. From second year there is seperate building for IIIT Agartala classes. All facilities are same as of NIT Agartala. Sports complex, Hostels, Campus etc. Are same for both.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIIT Agartala - Indian Institute of Information Technology.

content.Placements: The first batch of IIIT Agartala will be passed out in 2022. Since IIIT Agartala doesn't have its own campus, its classes are conducted in NIT Agartala and also placements. So, IIIT Agartala students will get campus placements from NIT Agartala. The average salary package offered in NIT Agartala is around 4 LPA-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Authorities of our college promised that they would provide Wi-Fi facility within 30 days after the start of college. It has been 18 months, but Wi-Fi has not been provided. Classrooms have very old tables, and benches are short, and the infrastructure of the classrooms is below average. However, the infrastructure of labs and library is good, and I will give a rating of 4 stars out of 5 stars for it. The hostel is new and good, and I will rate it wilth 5 stars out of 5 stars. The quality of the food served will not be good for students who come from Northern states like UP, Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Bihar, etc. The rice is the main food for the Eastern region. Moreover, vegetables are not very fresh, and they are available at high rates compared to the Northern region, so the mess and food facilities are below average.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IIIT Agartala BTech?
faqs.answer: IIIT Agartala admissions are based on entrance exam. Candidates need to start by applying forJEE Main. After appearing for the entrance exam, candidates need to participate inJoSAA/ CSAB Counselling. JoSAA releasesJEE Main cutofffor IIIT Agartala BTech admission.Candidates scoring equal or above cutoff, are alloted seat. Once the shortlisted candidate has been allotted seat in the institute, they need to register and report physically at the institute. They need to register at IIIT Agartala portal and upload all the specified documents.

faqs.question: What is the fee at IIIT Agartala?
faqs.answer: The total fee of IIIT Agartalais a sum of multiple components such as admission fee, medical fee, tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Some of the components such as caution money is one-time payable while tuition fee needs to paid every year. Below is IIIT Agartala fee breakup for BTech:Fee ComponentFeeTuition feeINR 8 lakhCaution moneyINR 5,000Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Is getting admission at IIIT Agartala tough?
faqs.answer: IIIT Agartala considers JEE Main score for admission to BTech course. JEE Main is one of the competitive exams of India. So, the first hurdle that student faces is to qualify JEE Main with a good score. A thorough preparation can get student a good rank in the exam. IIIT Agartala cutoff is less competitive compared to other IIITs, IITs or NITs. In 2024, the closing rank for General-All India category was 60238. However, the cutoff changes every year. Hence, candidates must be well-prepared and try to get a good rank for admission in IIIT Agartala.

reviews.review_heading: Indian Institute of Information Technology is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities provided are very good, and I like them. The hostel is very hygienic and beautiful. Facilities like 24 hours water, electricity, sports and many more are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of its affordable fees and high placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities we get are at an NIT level since we don't have a permanent campus. The Wi-Fi has a daily limit of 2GB. The classrooms are not very good, but are manageable. The library is very good. It is one of the best libraries in India, I would say. The food quality is moderate for first-year students, but it improves afterward. There are also many canteens available with great-tasting food.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is good and facilities are also good.

Hostels are nice and clean on a daily basis. You can access Wi-Fi throughout the campus. 
Faculty members are good and experienced. You can play any sports that you like. 
And we have all of the grounds like football, basketball, volleyball, cricket, hockey, badminton, table tennis, etc. And we also have a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Good due to the campus in NIT Agartala. Greenery is the best thing all around.

Some buildings are old; like there is a new building, but looks-wise, it looks so old. The hostel is very nice; I got a new hostel which is so good.

The library has more than 5000 books and is very well-equipped. Students can choose from four different messes based on their preferences. The sports complex is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: With great placements and infrastructure in the coming years, one could opt for CSE.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is average.
It is in the development stage, with not so good infrastructure but you will get good placement as all the companies visiting NIT Agartala also visit IIIT Agartala. You can take admission to a good sports facility with great grounds, an indoor court, gym, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good opportunity for computer science.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Education is really good.

content.Placements: The highest percentage is 80 percent of students were placed in this course. I am pursuing the course. I do not have much idea about the companies. My brother told me that in our college the recruitment is done by the top companies and offers well.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is available in this college. Everything is well maintained and hygienic. Our canteen is also clean and hygienic and the quality of food is also good. Everything is well managed by the authorities. Classroom, library etc are well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Chemistry, Biotechnology, Microbiology) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50-80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 5,000 per month. The average salary offered ranges between Rs 25,000 per month - Rs 45,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharmaceutical Industries and Zydus Cadila Healthcare. Around 80-90% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory is very good. All facilities are available. The food served in the canteen is very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. The teaching quality is better. Our college has different teachers for each subject. They are helpful and skilled. Semester exams are moderate. The pass criterion is 7-9 CGPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are L&T and InfoChip. Top roles offered are graphic designer and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: There are two different hostel buildings for girls and boys. Our campus has around 2-3 Wi-Fi connections. The food served in every hostel is very good. Our college has 3-4 grounds for sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.
content.Faculty: Our faculty members are very excellent, qualified, and experienced. Semseter exams are moderate and provide proper practice for final exams. There are three exams every semester, of which two are mid-semester exams, and the other is the final exam.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend taking admission here.

content.Placements: The placement cell is good. About 70% of students get placements in the final year. The average salary package is 4.5 LPA and the lowest to date is 3 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Many companies come for the recruitment process. TCS and Amazon are among the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The hostel is not good. The laundry service is not up to date. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games is not good. The Wi-Fi is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Campus is very huge and the teachers are very well educated.

content.Placements: 98 percentage students are placed. Amazon, Tcs. The best recruitment process is done here. Many foreign companies now comes into the campus recruitment. Each and every student gets an internship through college. Good placement cell is there in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is near campus. Nice food service. Excellent security. Huge campus with high-class teaching faculty. High-class greenery. Canteen facilities are there in the college. Every sports facility there in the college. Every year a sports week is conducted.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Education is really good.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is available in this college. Everything is well maintained and hygienic. Our canteen is also clean and hygienic and the quality of food is also good. Everything is well managed by the authorities. Classroom, library etc are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory is very good. All facilities are available. The food served in the canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University.
reviews.review_text: There are two different hostel buildings for girls and boys. Our campus has around 2-3 Wi-Fi connections. The food served in every hostel is very good. Our college has 3-4 grounds for sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend taking admission here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The hostel is not good. The laundry service is not up to date. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games is not good. The Wi-Fi is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is very huge and the teachers are very well educated.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is near campus. Nice food service. Excellent security. Huge campus with high-class teaching faculty. High-class greenery. Canteen facilities are there in the college. Every sports facility there in the college. Every year a sports week is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Not good placement, supportive faculty, nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is really good and there are lush green gardens in our college. The labs and classrooms are good but the classroom doesn't have AC. The library is also very good and contains 2 floors. The hostel location is just beside the college and it s really good. The food quality is really good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities on campus.
reviews.review_text: The college has one of the best infrastructures. The reason for giving 4 stars is the quality of food available in the mess. The mess food is below average I would say. The Wi-Fi facility and gymnasium are good. Labs also have a nice structure and facilities. The classrooms have nice ventilation and a proper study environment.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and teachers, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is full of greenery which is eye soothing. The infrastructure is good in our college but there is no air-conditioner in the classroom due to which students face difficulty in summers for attending lectures. The hostel is very good and contains a mess and a gym. The laboratories are good and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good faculty members and average infrastructure, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very greenery. It provides computer laboratories with the best internet connection. But classrooms are without air-conditioners so students are suffering on summer days. Smart classrooms are available but rarely students get a chance to visit, apart from a lush green garden.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good teachers, infrastructure, and facilities, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good with a lush garden. Our campus is very cool as there is a lot of greenery. The hostel is very good and well maintained. Rector sir is also very helpful and solves problems quickly. The classrooms do not contain air-conditioner which makes it difficult to attend a lecture in summer.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty, poor placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure with lush green gardens and a good environment. The campus is very good and classrooms are also good but there is no air-conditioner in classes because of which we suffer difficulties in summer. The campus also consists of a teapost and two stationeries.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good placement .
reviews.review_text: College is located at a good area surrounded by a good environmental conditions and connected to a highway. The college has many facilities for sports and 2-3 play grounds. It also has well-equipped laboratory and workshops for every fields of students. It also provide hostel facility which has a valuable and reasonable price and provide good facility.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel is average. Sometimes hot water is not available. But the most important the hostel is clean and safe. The hostel rooms are big enough for 2-3 students. Facilities are also available like freeze, air-conditioners, chair, table, etc. The hostel has a volleyball ground and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and placement is average.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and campus is beautiful and facilities provided by our college is quite good and wi-fi provided by our college is with restriction and classrooms are very good and library is also good. Food quality in the canteen is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the campus is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty awesome, and you will feel like you are studying abroad. All labs and classrooms are perfect. But at some rainwater may create some problems in college, but overall there is no comprise in college or hostel infrastructure. The canteen and sports place are also good.

college_info.college_name: VBSPU Jaunpur: Courses, Admission 2025, Fees, Scholarship, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University admissions 2025-26 are open for Diploma, UG, and PG courses. Interested candidates can check and apply for their desired course through the official university website. A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University offers specialisations in its flagship courses, which are MBA and BTech. Apart from JEE Main and PUCAT, the University shortlists candidates based on the exam rankings of the UPSEE/UPTU exam for admission to BTech. The fee for BTech reaches around INR 40k - 60k (annually). The annual fees for an MBA course sum up to INR 50K (per semester).
For an MBA, candidates must graduate with 45% marks at the graduation level. Apart from the graduation marks, the University considers UPSEE results as a mode of admission.
The University offers UG, PG, PhD, and PG Diplomas in various programmes distributed across the fields of Engineering, Commerce, Medicine, Management, Science and Law. VBSPU offers 1000+ courses through 6 different departments, catering to every course and its specialisation separately. The candidates can seek programs in BTech from the UNS Institute of Engineering and Technology. For specialisation in MBA, VBSPU has a Faculty of Management Studies. For more details regarding the VBSPU programs, check out the table given below:
Check out more details in the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    The VBSPU ‘Rozgar Mela’ or the job fair is the University’s secondary support to provide placement support. Besides this facility, the University’s primary support is to make sure to prepare the students sufficiently enough to achieve a job based on their skill set. The University helps the students prepare for the interviews and gives job-specific training providing them with a more practical approach to the work ahead.
faqs.question: Does VBSPU offer any placement support?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: VBSPU offers at least 1000+ courses through all the affiliated colleges combined. The eligibility to become part of all these courses involves an aggregate of a minimum of 45% marks, along with the entrance exams such as CUET-UG/PG and PUCAT. Courses such as BTech take up 70% of seats through JEE Mains, while the remaining 30% of seats get filled through PUCAT. In terms of MBA course fees, a 2-year program can gross up to, INR 1.1 lakh, whereas, a 4-year course such as BTech costs up to INR 2.5 lakh.

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee is 500 for General/OBC and 250 for SC/ST.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for M.Tech at VBSPU Jaunpur?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure of VBSPU varies from INR 14,450 to INR 3.2 Lacs depending on the programme and its duration. The provision to pay semester-wise and/or annually is available for the students. The total expense also involves one-time fees and several other charges availed during the admissions. The entire bifurcation of the fee structure involves tuition fees, books/stationary, hostel fees, security deposits, and a few more amenities that a student avails of during the entire period of academia.
faqs.question: How costly is VBSPU?

faqs.answer: A:    After considering all the specialisations, around 50%-70% of seats are allocated to the candidates who qualify the accepted entrances such as PUCAT, and JEE Main. For UG and PG courses, the CUET exam scores are taken into consideration for admission to fill 50% of seats. For courses such as BTech, JEE Main’s scores are considered to allocate 70% of seats, and the remaining 30% are allocated via the PUCAT exam. Some courses such as BCA and diplomas require the PUCAT exam after the qualification of 10+2.
faqs.question: Can I get into VBSPU without taking the PUCAT exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG, and Diploma levels in full-time mode. These programmes are offered under six faculties, admission to some of the courses is based on the university-conducted entrance exam and for remaining courses are through national-level entrance exams, such as JEE Main, UPCET, etc. Tabulated below is the list of some of the popular courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:CourseEligibility & Selection CriteriaBPharmaEligibility: Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 45% to 50% aggregate Selection: UPCET/ PUCAT + CounsellingBPharmaEligibility: Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregateSelection: UPCETBScEligibility: Class 12 in the Science stream with 45% aggregateSelection: UPCETMScEligibility: Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate Selection: PUCATBCAEligibility: Class 12 in any streamSelection: PUCAT

faqs.answer: VBSPU begins its admission process in March and goes on till April/June, depending on the deadlines. The admission process involves registration via the PUCAT exam online form. Candidates must go through the information brochure, provided on the official website to check for their eligibility. The ones applying for the reservation category must also check for eligibility before the submission of the application. The process involves an entrance test (PUCAT), after which the results are announced and the dates of counselling are issued.

faqs.answer: Yes, Especially in terms of return on investment, Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University (VBSPU) may be recommended as a top MBA school. The MBA programme provides a respectable return on investment with a total tuition cost of INR 1 Lacs and a median package of INR 1.20 LPA. Although there weren't many placements in 2022, the competitive cost structure and possibility for a somewhat higher median package make it a desirable choice for individuals looking for an MBA programme that is both reasonable and worthwhile.

overview_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for the BSc programme at Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the BSc programme at Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University is ranges from INR 30,000 to INR 90,000. However, the VBSPU Jaunpur BSc fee structure comprises many other factors apart from the tuition fee. Further, the hostel fees are meant for accommodation facilities, miscellaneous fees meant for extracurricular activities, internet facilities, among others. These could be one-time or recurring in nature where the charge may be made annually or semesterly. The above-mentioned fees have been extracted from the institution's official website/sanctioning body. Hence, it is still subject to changes and is thus indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for M.Sc students at V.B.S. Purvanchal University?
overview_faqs.answer: The hostel fees for MSc students at VBSPU is INR 1.06 lakh. This fee includes room charges, mess charges, security charges, etc. Other than this, students have to pay other fees, such as tuition fees, academic fees, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Is Purvanchal (VBSPU) University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Especially in terms of return on investment, Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University (VBSPU) may be recommended as a top MBA school. The MBA programme provides a respectable return on investment with a total tuition cost of INR 1 Lacs and a median package of INR 1.20 LPA. Although there weren't many placements in 2022, the competitive cost structure and possibility for a somewhat higher median package make it a desirable choice for individuals looking for an MBA programme that is both reasonable and worthwhile.

overview_faqs.question: Is BTech CSE available at VBSPU?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers a full-time Bachelor of Technology (BTech) in Computer Science Engineering course. The duration of the course is four years. Admission to the BTech CSE course is entrance exam-based. Candidates seeking admission to BTech CSE at VBSPU must meet the following criteria:Eligibility: Class 12 in the Science streamSelection: UPCET/ JEE Main/ CUET / PUCAT + UPTAC Counselling/ Counselling conducted by the university

review_summary.college_name: VBSPU Jaunpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University [VBSPU].

content.Placements: No placement available, zero percent of placement available. Internships are available, but not very active. Approximately 5 or 10 percent of students got internships in this course, maybe just because it is a graduation degree. Most internships are in accounting, data entry, and the HR sector.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on this campus. It's a main campus with a library, a cool water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, a computer lab, a medical room, and classrooms, all available in the IBM building. Sports grounds are also available, and food is acceptable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University, Jaunpur Review.

content.Placements: Placements are not available, but internships are available; however, not every year and not for all students. It's just 10 or 15 percent of internships available, and if we talk about placement percentage, it's zero, especially in this course. Most of the roles in internships were in accounts, data analysis, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on the campus. It's the main campus, and good quality food is provided by the mess. In the department, the library, computer lab, seminar halls, water cooler, medical room, and classes are available. Sports grounds are also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University.

content.Placements: No placement is available in this course, in case of placement it's useless. Internships are available but at a very low level minimum 10 to 20%, and not all students every year get internships. MS internship is obtained by students in areas like accountant, data entry, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, not bad. It is well developed but it's developed more as other colleges in this city. Library, computer lab, seminar hall, and classes are available in the building. Now canteen is closed, but other facilities are available in the department.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: V. B. S. P. U, Jaunpur, IBM review.

content.Placements: No placement is available in this course because it's just a graduation, I think. But I didn't see any person in my course getting a placement. Internships are available, but not for every student and at the same percentage. Sometimes, some people get internships, but it's very low, with a maximum of 10 or 15% students getting internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, not well developed, but developed in my course building, IBM. Computer labs are available. The library and classroom are available, and each floor has neat and clean washrooms. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen is also available. The sports ground is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: V. B. S. P. U. Jaunpur review.

content.Placements: No placement is available in this college. In case of placement, I will rate this college zero only for this course. I am not talking about all courses. I never see anyone in my course get placement in any companies. Internships are available, but not in huge numbers, only about 5 or 10 percent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, and all types of facilities are available on my campus. In my building, we have a library, cold water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, computer lab, and classrooms. Hostels are good, and the food is bearable, not so bad but not so good.

admission_overview.title: VBSPU Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Purvanchal University offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG, and diploma levels in full-time mode. These programmes are offered under six faculty, admission to some of the courses is based on the university-conducted entrance exam, namely the Purvanchal University Combined Admission Test, admission to remaining courses are conducted through national-level entrance exams, including JEE Main, UPCET, etc. The university follows a common application process for all the courses. Interested and eligible candidates are required to register on the official website of VBSPU in online mode to seek admission. Reservation of seats is as per the UP State Government/ University norms. A relaxation of 5% aggregate in the qualifying degree exam is applicable for SC/ST candidates across all the courses. The University also reserves the right to admit University Employee wards as per VBSPU rules.
