admission_process.title: VBSPU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: VBSPU offers three UG courses: BPharma, BTech and BSc. The university offers MSc, MTech, MCA, MA and PG Diploma at PG level. VBSPU admissions to most of the courses are primarily entrance-based. The table below shows the eligibility, selection criteria and total tuition fee:
1 - VBSPU Application Process
Visit the official website.
Complete the application form.
Pay the application fee - specified on the website.
Submit the filled form before the notified deadline.
2 - Course-wise Selection Process
VBSPU conducts its own entrance examination for certain courses. These exams are VBSPUET or other entrance tests for speicific programs.
For some courses, VBSPU also accepts scores of national-level entrance exams like JEE, NEET, or others.
After resukts of above mentioned exams are released, VBSPU notifies a merit list. The list is published on the website.
3 - Counselling & Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted candidates will be invited to appear for the counseling process.
Candidates must bring original documents for verification.
After document verification and seat allotment, candidates must pay the course fee to confirm admission.

courses_data.name: VBSPU BPharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University (VBSPU)offersBachelor of Pharmacy (BPharma)course of a four-year duration. The course is divided into eight semesters, and the mode of education is full-time. The university also gives a three-year Lateral Entry BPharma course. students can apply for BPharma admission online, and the university provides entrance exam-based admission to BPharma and Lateral Entry BPharma courses.

faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for BPharma at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: The VBSPU BPharma admission criteria require students to have completed Class 12 in Science. They also should have scored a minimum of 50% marks. Both PCB and PCM students are accepted. CUET is compulsory for admissions.

faqs.question: What is the application process for the BPharma programme at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: VBSPU BPharma course applications are available on the official website. First, register for the course, the fill out the application form. After that, upload scanned copies and pay the application fees. The application fee is INR 250 – 500.

faqs.question: Can I get into VBSPU without taking the PUCAT exam?
faqs.answer: After considering all the specialisations, around50%-70% of seatsare allocated to the candidates who qualify the accepted entrances such as PUCAT, and JEE Main. For UG and PG courses, theCUET examscores are taken into consideration for admission to fill 50% of seats. For courses such asBTech, JEE Main’sscores are considered to allocate 70% of seats, and the remaining30%are allocated via thePUCATexam. Some courses such as BCA and diplomas require the PUCAT exam after thequalification of 10+2.

courses_data.name: VBSPU PhD Admission 2025
courses_data.description: For PhD admission at VBSPU,students need tofill the application form provided by the university. The form includes personal details, educational qualifications, research interests, etc. Selection is basis PUCRET conducted by the university. The eligibility for the program ismaster degree with minimum 55% marks, national level fellowships or relevant work experience. Admission process includes entrance test and interview.

faqs.question: What is the counseling and document verification process in Ph.D. admissions at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have made it to the short list of VBSPU PhD programme are invited for counselling and a document check. Candidates may be required to present their original certificates, grade reports, and other required papers throughout this procedure for verification. Additionally, choosing a research manual and talking about the study topic of interest are both steps in the counselling process.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to the PhD programme at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: Candidates must have a master's degree with a minimum GPA of 55% in order to be eligible for admission to the Ph.D. programme at VBSPU. Candidates with appropriate work experience or national-level fellowships may also qualify. In most cases, the entrance exam (PUCRET) and the interview make up the admissions procedure. Consult the official VBSPU website for the most up-to-date and comprehensive details on the available Ph.D. programmes and entrance criteria.

faqs.question: Is PhD available at VBSPU?
faqs.answer: VBSPU PhD course eligibility requirements include a master's degree with at least 55% marks. Those who have national-level fellowships and work experience may also be eligible to apply. The admissions are based on PUCRET exam scores. More information is present on the official website.

faqs.question: How costly is VBSPU?
faqs.answer: The fee structure of VBSPU varies fromINR 14,450toINR 3.2 Lacsdepending on the programme and its duration. The provision to pay semester-wise and/or annually is available for the students. The total expense also involves one-time fees and several other charges availed during the admissions. The entire bifurcation of the fee structure involves tuition fees, books/stationary, hostel fees, security deposits, and a few more amenities that a student avails of during the entire period of academia.

These programmes are offered under six faculties, admission to some of the courses is based on the university-conducted entrance exam and for remaining courses are through national-level entrance exams, such asJEE Main,UPCET, etc. Tabulated below is the list of some of the popular courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:CourseEligibility & Selection CriteriaBPharmaEligibility: Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 45% to 50% aggregateSelection: UPCET/PUCAT+ CounsellingBPharmaEligibility: Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregateSelection: UPCETBScEligibility: Class 12 in the Science stream with 45% aggregateSelection: UPCETMScEligibility: Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregateSelection: PUCATBCAEligibility: Class 12 in any streamSelection: PUCAT

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for B.Sc admission at VBPSU Jaunpur?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for BSc at Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University was April 15, 2024. However, the registration process commenced on March 1, 2024.. Applications are invited through the online mode only. Candidates seeking admission have to complete their application prior to this deadline. Admission shall be based on the scores obtained in the Purvanchal University Combined Admission Test. Currently, the process of filling out the application form for a BSc programme at VBSPU Jaunpur has been closed.

data: IAS officers are responsible for placing government policies into execution and overseeing their functioning at the grassroots level.
IPS officers ensure public safety by supervising the police agencies of states and Union Territories.
IFS officers are responsible for maintaining good international relationships with other countries on behalf of India.
SSC officers are responsible for the different operational tasks of the organisation including compiling files, reports, and all the ongoing cases.
Research Associates plans, organizes, and conducts research for various market topics including the financial market.
CDS officers are responsible for supervising all three defense forces of India, the Military, the Navy, and the Air Force.
Indian Air Force officers are responsible for protecting the country against all aerial threats.
Bank POs are responsible for supervising the clerical staff. Apart from that, their key role includes managing cash flows, loans, and mortgages.
Social workers are responsible for improving the lives of the people they are taking care of and helping them find solutions to their problems.

faqs.question: Can I get government job after BA from VBSPU Jaunpur?
faqs.answer: After completing BA from VBSPU Jaunpur, candidates have a wide range of job opportunities in goverment sector. They need to appear for different government exams held by various authorities to secure a well-paying and respected government job. faqs.question: Does VBSPU offer any placement support?
faqs.answer: The VBSPU ‘Rozgar Mela’ or the job fair is the University’s secondary support to provide placement support. Besides this facility, the University’s primary support is to make sure to prepare the students sufficiently enough to achieve a job based on their skill set. The University helps the students prepare for the interviews and gives job-specific training providing them with a more practical approach to the work ahead.

description: VBSPU Jaunpur cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about VBSPU Jaunpur UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The VBSPU Jaunpur cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the VBSPU Jaunpur BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 547431 and 1411305 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first round cutoff rank fo

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 547431 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 514307 in 2023 and 337198 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated an improving trend.

Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University [VBSPU] accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to VBSPU Jaunpur can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

VBSPU Jaunpur admissions to PG courses has concluded with the release of Round 3 seat allotment results. The CUET PG cutoff has been released only for MCA course in 2024 for General and PWD HS categories. As per the VBSPU Jaunpur cutoff 2024, the first round cutoff rank for MCA course stood at 16718 for the General AI quota. Check out Shivaji University First and Last Round rank for the same course from the table below:

The CUET PG admissions have been closed now with the release of last round cutoff release. VBSPU Jaunpur CUET PG cutoff 2024 was released for admission to Master of Computer Applications (MCA). The last round closing score for MCA, for the General Home State category candidates, was 15433. In 2023 and 2022, the last round closing scores for MCA were closed at 18013 and 15093, respectively. Looking at the cutoff ranks for the past three years, the cutoff showed a declining trend. Checkout the cat

CUET PG cutoff is the minimum mark applicants need to secure to get admission in college/university. The participating universities will release a particular subject's CUET PG 2024 cut-off separately. Check out the structured schedule for CUET PG for 2025 from the table below:

As the VBSPU Jaunpur UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at VBSPU Jaunpur.
During last round B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning proved to be the toughest for this category, with the closing cutoff being .

The top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category were B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, followed by B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with the UPTAC last round closing ranks of 595820, 947782 and 1801523, respectively.

For admission to VBSPU Jaunpur for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University [VBSPU].

library.description:
Central Library is one of the largest repositories of information in Uttar Pradesh to provide quality services to its students, research scholars, teachers and staffs. It is s  three storied impressive modern library building with the name of Vivekanand Central Library.  In 2016, the Central Library has been awarded as a “Centre of Excellence” by Govt. of Uttar Pradesh. The Library premises are under CCTV surveillance to control unethical incidents. Library has Wi Fi connectivity to provide Internet as well as e-Resource facilities to its users even after closing the library.
Now the Library is working with SOUL software package for its in-house job like circulation, serial control, cataloguing, OPAC/Web OPAC etc.
The present Library stock comprises 1,12,006 books, 318 professional Indian and foreign journals and magazines, 557 back volumes of journals, 10211 Ph.D. theses, 760 CD, 12 Newspapers, 216 Govt. publications, press clippings since 2008. Library has a reach collection of reference books like, encyclopedia, dictionary, yearbook, atlas, directory, almanacs etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Stadium

reviews.review_heading: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University [VBSPU].
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on this campus. It's a main campus with a library, a cool water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, a computer lab, a medical room, and classrooms, all available in the IBM building. Sports grounds are also available, and food is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University, Jaunpur Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. All facilities are available on the campus. It's the main campus, and good quality food is provided by the mess. In the department, the library, computer lab, seminar halls, water cooler, medical room, and classes are available. Sports grounds are also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, not bad. It is well developed but it's developed more as other colleges in this city. Library, computer lab, seminar hall, and classes are available in the building. Now canteen is closed, but other facilities are available in the department.

reviews.review_heading: V. B. S. P. U, Jaunpur, IBM review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, not well developed, but developed in my course building, IBM. Computer labs are available. The library and classroom are available, and each floor has neat and clean washrooms. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen is also available. The sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: V. B. S. P. U. Jaunpur review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, and all types of facilities are available on my campus. In my building, we have a library, cold water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, computer lab, and classrooms. Hostels are good, and the food is bearable, not so bad but not so good.

reviews.review_heading: V. B. S. P. U Jaunpur B.Com (H) review
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. In the department, we have a library, cold water facility, clean washrooms, seminar halls, computer lab, and classes. Hostels are good, well secured, and have good food facility. Ambulance is always available outside the hostel just for safety.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Microtek College of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I want to improve the way they provide practical knowledge in greatly way.
reviews.review_text: 60 percent of the students were placed in the course. In my college, packages were above average. Highest salary totally depends on the students. If the performance of students good, they get the highest package. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, etc. Students got internships. Placement and training activities were held on regular basis.

reviews.review_heading: Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University Jaunpur (B.Teach).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The library and labs are available in good condition. Every needed thing is available for students. Canteen food is also good. They also have a separate playground and different buildings for labs and classes. Overall, good infrastructure at all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Technical Education and Research Institute (TERI, Ghazipur)
reviews.review_heading: It is good for low budget students as well as looking for scholarship opportunity.
reviews.review_text: Everything is fine and available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, conference hall, playground, park, etc. There is a hostel but none of the students stay there and take a PG or room near the college. Canteen is there. Medical facilities are there. Sports and games can be played on the ground attached to the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Sant Kinaram MahavidyalayReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college and college's condition is best.
reviews.review_text: Good. Campus infrastructure is well-maintained with good Wi-Fi connectivity, air-conditioned classrooms, a fully equipped library, and modern labs. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and proper security. Food in the mess is hygienic and affordable. Sports facilities like basketball and cricket grounds are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is excellent and the infrastructure is decent, but placements could improve.
reviews.review_text: Our college's infrastructure is good, and our labs are very good, with all facilities provided to students. However, the classes are not maintained perfectly. Overall, everything is fine in our college because the library is very nice for learning peacefully and with full focus. Our canteen and hostels are also very structured and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Maa Saraswati MahavidyalayaReviewed on 19 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The institute offers excellent infrastructure with smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, a modern library, and secure, comfortable hostel facilities. The college provides cleanliness, 24/7 Wi-Fi, and safety measures, making it ideal for focused learning and living. Welcome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dashrath SansthanReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is excellent. Big airy rooms with CCTV cameras, fans and good light. There is no hostel because it is in a very rural area. There is no mess, no canteen for students. There are basic medical facilities available here. There is a big sports ground for Volleyball, Football, and many small games.

reviews.review_heading: If you are in Jaunpur so it's best universities in Jaunpur.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure and facilities in our department. We have library, conference hall, computer lab, and water facilities. They provide study material and at university I think all the facilities are available including games and extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shibli National CollegeReviewed on 21 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best thing about our college is that it has a good environment for studying.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good, and the hostel is also very good. The food is good, and a lot of attention is paid to cleanliness. The girls’ hostel looks very clean, the environment is pleasant, and the security is top class.

college_info.college_name: VBSPU Jaunpur Scholarship Details

paragraphs: VBSPU Jaunpur offers two types of scholarships to students. The university offers a Post-Matric Scholarship to students. The Veer Bahadur Singh Purvanchal University provides financial assistance to the relatives of Kargil Martyrs and the victims of natural disasters (Tsunami victims). The Post-Matric Scholarship is for the candidates whose parents/guardians' total income doesn't exceed INR 2 lakh for Backward Caste, General, Minorities, and INR 2.5 lakh for SC/ST category candidates.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Joining this college is a good decision.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students are placed, and drives are also conducted for other students. The highest package is 40 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average package offered by companies is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my college are Infosys, Deloitte, TCS, Cognizant, and Capgemini. Product-based companies like Amazon and ServiceNow are also hiring from our college.
content.Infrastructure: We have top-notch infrastructure. Classrooms are integrated with projectors for e-learning, and labs have Ethernet connections. We also have a large library that consists of all academic-related and self-help books. The quality of the food available in the college is very hygienic.

admission_process.title: Pragati Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pragati Engineering College admission is entrance-based for its UG and PG courses. The college offers one course at the UG level, i.e., BTech, and one course at the PG level, i.e., MTech.Pragati Engineering Collegeoffers an online mode of application. Applicants can apply online by visiting the official website of the college to apply for admission. To know more about Pragati Engineering College admission 2025, go through the following section:

Pragati Engineering College admission is open for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG, and PG, courses, including BTech and MTech. To be eligible for admission, applicants are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college accepts AP EAMCET exam scores for admission to BTech and AP PGECET exam scores for admission to MTech. Want to know other admission-related details aboutPragati Engineering College coursealong with eligibility and selection criteria, check out the table below:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class 12 from a from a recognised board
Graduation from a recognised institute/university

Pragati Engineering College's admission process contains multiple steps, such as the application process, selection, and fee payment for final seat confirmation. Admission is open for all courses. Given below are the step-by-step details for Pragati Engineering College admission 2025:
STEP 1: Pragati Engineering College Application Process 2025

To fill out the application form, applicants must fill out the Pragati Engineering College admission eligibility criteria and selection criteria. After that, applicants are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college.
STEP 2: Pragati Engineering College Selection Round

Pragati Engineering College offers admission to applicants for BTech and MTech based on AP EAMCET and AP PGECET, respectively. Additionally, applicants must fulfil the eligibility criteria for a particular course to be eligible for admission.STEP 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

For final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official website. After applicants get shortlisted based on their merits, they must pay thePragatiEngineering College feeto lock in their seats.

paragraphs: The placement process at Pragati Engineering College includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. The final placements at Pragati Engineering College are a result of very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students.

As per the latest report, Pragati Engineering College is conducting the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the highest package till July 9, 2024 offered during Pragati Engineering College placements in 2024 stood at INR 40 LPA. A total of 53 recruiters visited the campus for placements, and presented 1412 job offers to the students of the batch 2024. The top recruiters of Pragati Engineering College in 2024 included Autodesk, Big Works, Tvarana, Intellipaat, HP, Accenture, Deloitte, Tech Mahindra, Avineon, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Joining this college is a good decision.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and placements.

Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, because of the faculty and good placement in 2024 .
reviews.review_text: The faculty of the college is very good and very approachable. The students and infrastructure of the college are pretty well and well maintained. Internet is accessible to the entire campus. The classrooms are pretty large and well-maintained, and the library is also very large and well maintained.  Our hostel is also good. The mess, canteen, and medical facilities are awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in the surat city
reviews.review_text: There is wifi available for everyone. In addition to this, library have many books and quite reading halls too. Classrooms have projectors and all the required things. Furthermore, hostel is pretty good. Foods available in the hostel mess is good too. Also, college premises are always clean. College also have a healthy environment where students can motivate each other to do better.

reviews.review_heading: Best Engineering College in Surat.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are better and infrastructure is best. Wi-fi facility available in the campus. Labs are well maintained and classroom look little old but are well-equipped with projector and other necessary things. Many food varieties available in and outside the campus. Every sports are played in their proper courts and has proper sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sarvajanik College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and the hostel canteen mess is also good. Wi-Fi and connectivity throughout the college are nice. Classrooms are good. The labs are well conditioned, but the PCs could be better. The library is also good; many books are available for all your needs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has many computer labs. The library is available in our college. The hostel is situated nearby our college. Our college has a canteen. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is available in our classrooms. Our college has labs. Classrooms are smart. Our college provides the best facilities throughout the state. The library has all the necessary books related to courses. They provide basic amenities in classrooms. They provide drinking water. Our college has a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides wonderful campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure and facilities. There are classrooms and different kinds of clubs in our college. We have a playground where we can play many games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good salary packages and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. The infrastructure of our college is old, but they colored it to make it look new. Labs and classrooms were average. Air-conditioned systems are not available in classrooms. Lab facilities are good, but there is a lack of some instruments. In the computer science department, facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Scet college - best college in Surat.
reviews.review_text: Our college has average facilities. Like classes are larger. The reading hall and library are very clean and ambiance of it is peaceful. Here we are provided by jio Wi-Fi - we can have 1.5gb data daily. Apart from it, hostel is so big, clean and room condition is far better. One of the best part of our college is canteen - here all type of food is served. Taste of food is pretty good. Sports and game events are often hold in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in terms of teaching quality, campus life, placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the required facilities for students like free Wi-Fi, canteen, sports, playground, etc. The quality of food served in the college is very good. All sports facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has average placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratory, classrooms, library, canteen, etc., are available. Personal computers are old. Wi-Fi is available in our hostels. The food served in the mess is great. Playground is available. There are courts for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: SCET Surat. The college is average.
reviews.review_text: The college has got ethernet facility in the labs as well as Wi-Fi for the students. The hostel infrastructure is excellent the toilets are clean. The hostel offers only vegetarian food. But you may not like the food. Our college organises inter department match for various games. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for computer engineering and information technology in Surat.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college provides many facilities like a hostel, a canteen, Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. The food served in the canteen and mess is good. Our college provides sports facilities. Our college has a cricket ground, but any student is not allowed to play on this ground except hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sarvajanik College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. A canteen, AC, Wi-Fi, labs, hardware labs, classrooms, library, gym, hostel, seminar hall, amphitheater, etc., are available. Hostels have AC as well as non-AC rooms along with basic amenities and a mess. The food is very hygienic. Medical facilities are available. There are separate common rooms for girls and boys. Sports facilities include cricket, volleyball, badminton, table tennis, football etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college should be one’s first choice.
reviews.review_text: I would rate the infra as 8 out of 10. Many classrooms are available and all the labs are available including a textile lab. Instruments do not work properly in the labs as they give errors many a times. A turbine lab is also available in SCET.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Anjuman-I-Islam's Kalsekar Technical Campus as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Anjuman-I-Islam's Kalsekar Technical Campus is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma, B.Arch, B.Sc, M.E./M.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Architecture & Planning, IT & Software. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Anjuman-I-Islam's Kalsekar Technical Campus boasts an impressive review rating of 3.81 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.7 for Campus Life, 2.96 for Placements, 4.3 for Faculty, and 4.06 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Anjuman-I-Islam's Kalsekar Technical Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Creating exuberant technical professionals.

content.Placements: A minimum of 40% of students in my course secured placements. Their packages are valuable and worthy. Companies like Tata, JSW, and Indian Railways, along with many others, are actively recruiting mechanical engineers. The top roles offered are in the merchant navy, marine engineering, design engineering, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: My college infrastructure is well-finished, and their labs and library also have a good interior. There are facilities of Wi-Fi in the library, canteen, and labs. There is indoor gaming, a courtyard, a backyard, and a gym. There is also a volleyball court and a badminton court in college. Medical teams and doctors are hired, and a counseling team is also hired. There is also a girls' common room in engineering, pharmacy, and architecture.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college have amazing mentors to guide through your journey.

content.Placements: The percentage of students being accepted is around 25%, the highest package being 3 lakhs per annum. Getting the role above manager was given. The companies usually come in here at are industry level and they have various interviews for the intake. The lowest package given was around 50k per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are perfect for learning; they do lack air conditioning. Library have amazing range of books related to fields and have Wi-Fi on every floor for usage got children related to academic purpose. Hostels are provided for the children by the college and the food quality and living quality are quite good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: To choose the best for career development, choose Kalsekar.

content.Placements: As a first-year engineering student at AIKTC, it was my amazing experience towards the placement records. The college till now had amazing placement records with the highest package of 10 LPA and the average package of 2 LPA. The faculty truly supports and encourages the students during placements.
content.Infrastructure: AIKTC is developing day by day, and it seems that in the next 2 years, the college hostel will also be prepared. The college has amazing infrastructure and facilities. All the labs, classrooms, administration lounge, etc., are regularly cleaned.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All the staff were good, the canteen is amazing, and the environment is excellent.

content.Placements: Fifty people were placed with salaries ranging from 10,000 to 200,000. Companies like Godrej and Tata were among the recruiters. Most students, around 60%, did internships in automobile companies. It’s a good college where you’ll love to be; everything is amazing, featuring a big courtyard, three grounds, and two canteens.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostels, but everything else is good. The college has a large courtyard, three grounds, and two canteens, creating a pleasant environment.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is average; we don't learn much until after placement. It can be quite challenging, but overall, the college environment is enjoyable, with great facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty support, good infrastructure, facilities etc.

content.Placements: AIKTC provides excellent placement opportunities with top companies visiting the campus for recruitments. For those seeking internships, the college offers robust support and guidance. Eligibility criteria for placements typically include a minimum GPA and successful completion of relevant course. The highest package offered was 7.5 LPA. A significant percentage of students secured placements.
content.Infrastructure: What stands out most about Kalsekar Technical Campus is its exceptional faculty and vibrant campus life. The faculty is not only knowledgeable but also genuinely invested in the students success. As for campus life, it’s a dynamic environment where every day offers new opportunities to engage, learn, and grow.

reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is well-finished, and their labs and library also have a good interior. There are facilities of Wi-Fi in the library, canteen, and labs. Library have amazing range of books related to fields and have Wi-Fi on every floor for usage got children related to academic purpose. reviews.review_heading: To choose the best for career development, choose Kalsekar.
reviews.review_text: AIKTC is developing day by day, and it seems that in the next 2 years, the college hostel will also be prepared. The college has amazing infrastructure and facilities. All the labs, classrooms, administration lounge, etc., are regularly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: All the staff were good, the canteen is amazing, and the environment is excellent.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostels, but everything else is good. The college has a large courtyard, three grounds, and two canteens, creating a pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty support, good infrastructure, facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: What stands out most about Kalsekar Technical Campus is its exceptional faculty and vibrant campus life. The faculty is not only knowledgeable but also genuinely invested in the students success. As for campus life, it’s a dynamic environment where every day offers new opportunities to engage, learn, and grow.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anjuman-I-Islam's Kalsekar Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. There is no hostel in our college. Labs are not updated. There are many shops and restaurants near our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a separate lab for every subject, such as EM lab, EP lab, BEE lab, and maths tutorial lab. The library and canteen are the best on campus. The library is free for everyone. It offers discussion rooms, study rooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a training ground.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was the best. Library and labs were the best. Classrooms were good but more lighting should be provided. Medical facility was good but it was available on alternate days.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities are excellent. Teachers provide excellent help. It's a good college all around.
reviews.review_text: Here, relatively high-quality infrastructure is offered. It was constructed recently, in or around 2011. The tools and computers in labs are well-designed and functional. Additionally, classrooms are excellent and each one has a projector. You won't have many chances to participate in sports and games; only the annual festival. The meal is inexpensive and available, despite the good mess.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college .
reviews.review_text: It doesn't have a hostel facility, but you can search for a private hostel near the college premises. But the food in the college canteen is very good; personally, my favorite is the coffee from the canteen. I have taken admission in computer engineering, and the labs here are fantastic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and the return on investment is better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our campus has 10.5 acres of land. Laboratories are excellent. It also provides a library where several books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely helping faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very beautiful. Labs, classrooms, and library are well maintained. The campus has been made or we can say developed in a well-structured manner. Students get attracted to the campus. The hostel is under development now it can be developed in some months from now.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members and infrastructure of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has a large central library filled with many books. Digital laboratories are Wi-Fi enabled. There are two canteens available in the college. One canteen is open and the other canteen is closed. Sports are also available. For the computer engineering course, the campus provides a separate floor for programming.

reviews.review_heading: My thoughts about Kalsekar.
reviews.review_text: Kalsekar has a very good infrastructure. I have liked the campus since day one. It has great classrooms, laboratories, auditorium, canteen, etc. The surroundings are always clean and hygienic. They provide good and affordable meals for students. But one drawback is that there is no hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: Study here and try to crack off campus placements .
reviews.review_text: Here the infrastructure is awesome, the teaching facilities are also well formed. One to one computer for every student with AC lab and the only thing in the campus I like is canteen and amazing delicious food is in canteen. The seating place and tables are clean and good quality of food is available .

At the UG level, the university provides BTech, BSc, BCA, BA, BBA, and others. At the PG level, the university provides MBA, MTech, MSc, MCA, and others. BA is provided in specialisations such as BA (Hons) in Economics, BA (Hons) in Political Science, BA (Hons) in English, BA (Hons) in History, etc. Below mentioned are some of the , and their respective eligibility and Alard University fee structure:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Alard University MBA admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Alard University MBA admission is entrance-based. Students need to provide a valid score of accepted test to be eligible for admission. However, CAT is not the only test that the university accepts. Students can also provide valid scores obtained in other management entrance tests, such as MAT/ XAT/ PERA/ MH-CET/ CMAT, etc. Alternatively, candidates can appear for the Alard University's entrance test as well. Hence, yes, you may get admission into the MBA course offered at Alard University without appearing for the CAT exam provided you have cleared any of the other accepted exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Ok ok college Placement record are not good

review_content.Placements: In 2024 I passed out. I didn’t find the college that good. Placements are 3.5/10, and the location isn’t great either. In this college, not many companies come; only one or two companies come in a year. Placement was not good. In this college, companies like Advance, IKS, and Take Care Health Solution come—just two or three companies, not many.
review_content.Infrastructure: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. Many more activities are conducted for study. Many kinds of games are available, like football, cricket, throw ball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is pretty good in overall perspectives.

review_content.Placements: Placements are pretty good in the college. They provide placements in major companies like Cipla. The average package is about 15,000/month. One may get placement in the industrial sector. There are also placements for study labs related to pharmacy. Overall, the college is good in terms of placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and all the infrastructure are built in a modern way, keeping in mind the growing technology. They provide Wi-Fi on every floor of the college. Proper amenities are also provided for the library. Hostel rooms are average, and the food is of good quality.

review_summary.college_name: Alard University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: No college is very good. I got internship at this college.

content.Placements: Best college for B.Tech 60 out of 55 students are placed. The best college for CSE faculty is also very helpful. All events are celebrated, and the college also provides a internship to every student, and many companies hire many students, and 2 or 3 companies have partnered with the college.
content.Infrastructure: College building area is clean and in touch with the hostel. Hostel fees are also in our budget. The hostel is cleaned daily, and the mess is also very clean and hygienic. The hostel for boys and girls is separate, so no one can interfere with both. It also provides a study table and many more functions celebrated in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for sports.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are pretty decent. They do not have internships, but they do have some companies that offer paid internships. It's not good for internships, but they are good if you only want a degree. Only 2-3 people in a classroom get the opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good as they have nice facilities, such as PCs, and all facilities are good. There are large classrooms for every student to sit in. The canteen facilities are also pretty nice, and sports are nice, as there is a huge turf which is best for sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and campus with sports ground and facilities. Good placements this year.

content.Placements: About 30–40% of the students secure placement through campus drives. It depends on your skills and knowledge whether you get selected or not. The package mainly depends on the job position and the company, but the lowest package can be around 3-4 LPA. Reputed companies like Glenmark, Advantmed, and IKS conduct campus drives. Most of the students obtain internships through the college, which helps them gain industrial knowledge. You can get jobs such as QC, QA, MR and medical coder.
content.Infrastructure: Things I like about college are the campus and the sports field. They have nets for cricket and football grounds, as well as sports equipment. Wifi is available on every floor and in the library. The classrooms are average and could be better. The labs need significant improvements; sometimes, chemicals are not available for practicals. The library is good, with a reading room and a wide selection of pharmaceutical-related books. Most students prefer PG accommodations over the hostel due to the poor quality of food and high fees.

admission_overview.title: Alard University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Alard University admission is a mix of both merit and entrance. The university offers several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses are offered across multiple fields, such as Law, Technology, Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Alard University accepts valid scores of relevant entrance exams, in addition to conducting its own entrance test (AUSET) to shortlist the candidates. The admission and application process for the courses offered at the university mainly commences online. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other admission-related information for Alard University Pune.

Students can either provide a valid score of any of the accepted entrances or appear for the Alard University Scholarship and Entrance Test (AUSET). admission_process.title: Alard University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission procedure for Alard University Pune involves multiple steps, such as registration, selection, and admission confirmation. Students must ensure that they meet the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying. The admission process commences online. Interested students can refer to the steps explained below to completeAlard University admission process:
Step 1: Alard University Application Process
Students can apply for the course of choice by visiting the university's official website and filling out the application form available online.
Step 2: Alard University Selection Rounds

The university shortlists candidates based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores, academic merit, GDPI performance, etc. For certain courses, students need to either provide valid entrance exam scores or appear for the entrance test conducted by the university. Further, admission to certain courses, such as MBA also required candidates to appear for the university-level GDPI rounds.
Step 3: Alard University Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spot at the university.

placement_data.title: Alard University Placement overview
paragraphs: As per the latest report, over 8,000 students were placed from the 2024 passing-out batch. The highest and average package offered during Alard University placements 2024 stood at INR 50 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively . More than 300 recruiters participated and presented various new-age job offers to the batch 2024 of courses like BTech , MBA , MCA , BPharma , etc. The top recruiters of Alard University placements 2024 included TCS, Axis Bank, Amul, Cognizant, Mother Dairy, Pantaloon, Accenture , etc.

Alard University has a Placement team that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at Alard University includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Alard University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: No college is very good. I got internship at this college.
reviews.review_text: College building area is clean and in touch with the hostel. Hostel fees are also in our budget. The hostel is cleaned daily, and the mess is also very clean and hygienic. The hostel for boys and girls is separate, so no one can interfere with both. It also provides a study table and many more functions celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good as they have nice facilities, such as PCs, and all facilities are good. There are large classrooms for every student to sit in. The canteen facilities are also pretty nice, and sports are nice, as there is a huge turf which is best for sports.

reviews.review_heading:
Ok ok college 
Placement record are not good
reviews.review_text: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. Many more activities are conducted for study. Many kinds of games are available, like football, cricket, throw ball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college is pretty good in overall perspectives.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and all the infrastructure are built in a modern way, keeping in mind the growing technology. They provide Wi-Fi on every floor of the college. Proper amenities are also provided for the library. Hostel rooms are average, and the food is of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus with sports ground and facilities. Good placements this year.
reviews.review_text: Things I like about college are the campus and the sports field. They have nets for cricket and football grounds, as well as sports equipment. Wifi is available on every floor and in the library. The classrooms are average and could be better. The labs need significant improvements; sometimes, chemicals are not available for practicals. The library is good, with a reading room and a wide selection of pharmaceutical-related books. Most students prefer PG accommodations over the hostel due to the ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Alard University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on each floor and library. They have provided internet rooms consisting of computers. Separate labs are available for each respective subject. Classrooms have cameras and modern-sized computer-based boards. Each floor consists of water purifiers. We have well-maintained sports turf which is available from 9 AM - 5 PM.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for studies but good for sports.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in my college include laboratories, computer labs, classrooms, and digital boards for an advanced education system. The library is a bit noisy. The college has a good playground with artificial grass (turf), and sports are played daily.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but dissatisfied by the placement cell.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is available, but the canteen food is pathetic, the medical infrastructure is poor, the labs are not fully equipped, the turf football ground is on campus, but they will not allow students to play there, and Wi-Fi is not available in college. The library and sitting areas are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college was above my expectations in terms of faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the CSE course at the Alard Group of Institutes are good enough. Students have access to computer labs for programming. Necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, library, canteen, sports, medical, etc., are available on the college campus. All these facilities are properly managed by the college management. Hostel facilities are also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The classes are good and the campus is clean and green. There is a big turf ground for students to practice various games. Various sports are conducted here and the development of the student is taken care of at each point. The mess is available, also various sports activities are conducted. The college rooms have a projector and various other gadgets to help the student understand better.

reviews.review_heading: It has well-equipped laboratories, a Wi-Fi campus, and a well-resourced library.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library, high-tech labs, and classrooms. The hostel is average. A canteen and cafeteria are available, and there is a big football ground. Being part of ACEM made my life easy. Staff members and teachers helped me not only with my studies but also with my social life. I am looking for the best part of my life with ACEM.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the good colleges, but it can be better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. The hostel facility is average. Our college provides workshops, playgrounds, and well-managed classrooms. There is a library with many important books which will definitely help you to study.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a great institute for a great beginning of a successful career.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the necessary facilities very efficiently. All the basic needs are taken care of in a good way and willing. Common needs such as Wi-Fi, air-conditioners, purified drinking water, sanitary facilities, etc., are possible to acquire very easily.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The industry lab is good and clean with working equipment. In the library, all reference books are available. The quality of facilities is available in the hostel like reading rooms. Good quality of food is available in mess and canteen. Many sports are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It has good classrooms and green environment.
reviews.review_text: The college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, and a library. The college is endowed with renovated hostels and medical support systems. The quality of hostel facilities is very good. Good mess facilities are provided to all students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BA at ICFAI University, Jaipur?
overview_faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur BA fees is sum of various components. These components are charged either one-time or semester-wise or annually. The total tuition fee for the BA programmes is INR 1.5 lakh. Additionally, the tuition fees for BA LLB (Hons) is INR 4.7 lakh. Students have to pay admission fees or first semester fees to lock their seats. It must be noted that the given fees is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to revision and, hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: How much does BBA at ICFAI University Jaipur cost?
overview_faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur BBA tuition fee is INR 2.8 lakh. In addition, a one-time fee of INR 20,000 is also included in the fee structure. The fees for the integrated BBA course may vary. This fee amount is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the fee for MBA at ICFAI University Jaipur?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for ICFAI University Jaipur is INR 8 lakh. The fee is valid for two-years. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants need to pay INR 500 as application fee in the start to register for MBA.

overview_faqs.question: Is ICFAI Jaipur BBA fee different for domicile and non-domicile candidates?
overview_faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur BBA fee vary for domicile and non-domicile students. The total fee for three year BBA course is INR 1.8 lakh for domicile. It is INR 2.1 lakh for non-domicile students. ICFAI Jaipur BBA four-year, the course fee is INR 2.4 lakh for domicile students. ICFAI four year BBA course fee is INR 2.8 lakh for non-domicile. This fee information is taken from the official website.

review_summary.college_name: ICFAI University Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) (Hons.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My college life at ICFAI, Jaipur.

content.Placements: There was placement drive which was conducted for our batch. From our batch, the highest package was 6 LPA. Out of 27 students from our batch 5-6 students who took part in placement drive got placed, others haven't participated. There were ICICI Bank, Pin Click, Byju's, and many other companies for the placement drive for our course. For the 1 batch before us for the same course, the highest package was 11 LPA offered by Byju's.
content.Infrastructure: As I was from ICFAI tech department so there were proper computer labs and other labs like DLD, physics, and chemistry. There was a central library for all departments. There was Wi-Fi in all places on campus. I was a hostel student so I could say that hostels were very good. There were all types of basic needed things available like washing machines, oven, induction, TV room, and sports hall inside hostel. Food was also good if there was any issue related to food sometimes it was solved as soon as possible.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: ICFAI Jaipur experience.

content.Placements: In BCA, the average salary package offered is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 14 LPA-15 LPA. Top recruiting companies such as Infosys, Wipro, TCS, GeeksforGeeks, Collebra, Gravita, Xebia, and many other good brands visit here to hire students. They offer all roles in any field. In our course, the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 12 LPA-14 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good. Hostel, mess, and Wi-Fi are available 24/7 on college campus for students. Hostel are good and we can play any sport we want. We can truly enjoy campus life here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Strong Placement Record with Excellent Industry Connections.

content.Placements: 90% of the students are placed, but the university tries its best for all the students. The lowest package is 2-3 LPA, the average is 5-7 LPA, and the highest is 21.75 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Byju's, and others recruit here. There is a 100% internship rate. Fields of study include Machine Learning, Data Science, DBMS, Testing, Deep Learning, and more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Amazing ICFAI University.

content.Placements: In ICFAI, there are departments for Law, Business, and Tech. In the Tech department, courses include BTech, BSc, and BCA in domains like AI, Cyber Security, Data Science, and Forensic Science. The placement rate is 90% in Tech, with the highest package till now being 21 LPA and the average around 6 or 7 LPA. Companies that have conducted recruitment include Xebia, Metacube, and Jaro. This university also provides various workshops and seminars to improve soft skills and offers many opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

individual_reviews.title: A Very Amazing University

admission_overview.title: ICFAI University Jaipur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ICFAI University Jaipur admissions are based on merit or entrance exam scores of the candidates. The university conducts ICFAI Law School Admission Test for BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons) courses. The university offers UG, PG and PhD level programmes. ICFAI University Jaipur offers courses in Science, Commerce, Arts, Computer Application, Management and other streams. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: ICFAI University Jaipur Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The university considers the qualifying exam scores of the candidates for admission to most of the courses. For courses such as BA LLB (Hons), BBA LLB (Hons), MTech, etc., admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. Candidates need to complete BCA/ BSc (IT)/ BSc (Computer Science) or equivalent degree or pass in BSc/ BCom/ BA with Mathematics as one of the subjects at Class 12 or rgaduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for MCA.
faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for MCA at ICFAI University Jaipur?

Besides, aspirants should also have a valid score in CLAT or LSAT for admission. Candidates without any entrance exam scores can appear for ICFAI Law School Admission Test (ILSAT) for admission.

admission_process.title: ICFAI University Jaipur Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: ICFAI Universityadmission processcan be completed online mode. The process includes various steps like registration, selection and admission confirmation. Check below the steps to take admission at the university:
ICFAI University Jaipur Application Process 2026

Candidates can apply online for their preferred programme. Aspirants applying via CUET must first fill the application form of the entrance exam. Candidates are charged an application fee of INR 500 to register for a course.

ICFAI University Jaipur selects candidates for UG courses based on merit or CUET-UG score. The university also accepts scores in LSAT, CLAT,  ICFAI Law School Admission Test for admission to BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons) courses. Aspirants are shortlisted for PG programmes based on entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round.
Admission Confirmation
The university notifies the candidates about their selection via email or message.

courses_data.name: ICFAI University Jaipur BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a four-year full-time BTech programme divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science, CSE-AI & ML, CSE (DS & AI),Mechanicaland ECE (VLSI Design). Admission to BTech programme is based on merit in the qualifying exam or CUET-UG scores. Selected candidates are further required to pass the personal interview round.

faqs.question: Is CUET accepted for BTech at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Yes, ICFAI University Jaipur does consider CUET score for admission to BTech programme. However, it is not mandatory to have a CUET score for admission. Candidates are also selected for BTech programme based on their Class 12 score. Once selected, aspirants also need to pass a personal interview round for admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate with pass in Mathematics, Physics, English and any one of the following subjects: Chemistry or Biology or Biotechnology or Computer Science to apply for ICFAI University Jaipur BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a four-year full-time BTech programme spread across eight semesters. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for BTech programme. The course is offered in various branches such as:Computer ScienceCSE-AI & MLCSE (DS & AI)MechanicalECE (VLSI Design)

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of The ICFAI University Jaipur for admission in 2024?
faqs.answer: The specific cutoff details for The ICFAI University Jaipur's 2024 admissions are not available. Cutoff information can differ based on the year and the respective entrance exam.

courses_data.name: ICFAI University Jaipur MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a two-year full-time MBA programme. The course includes 21 are compulsory courses and 8 elective courses. The course also includes a Summer Internship programme. The course is divided into four semesters. Students can choose elective from available options- Marketing, HRM, IT & Systems and Finance.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for MBA at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for ICFAI University Jaipur isINR 8 lakh. The fee is valid for two-years. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants need to pay INR 500 as application fee in the start to register for MBA.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must pass a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for ICFAI University Jaipur MBA programme. Final year degree students awaiting results are also eligible to apply for the MBA course. Besides, aspirants can get admission in MBA based on entrance exam scores such as CAT, NMAT, etc. followed by a personal interview round.

faqs.question: What are the MBA electives available at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Jaipur offers a two-year full-time MBA programme at the PG level. During the course, students need to choose electives. Below are the electives available for the MBA course:MarketingHRMIT & SystemsFinance

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted for MBA admission at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur MBA course admission is entrance-based. The eligible candidates can apply with a valid score of CAT/ NMAT/ XAT/ GMAT/ Other Management Test scores. Shortlisted candidates are further called for the interview round or other selection rounds. As per the official website, the selection procedure will be held in 8 IBS campuses and the IBS Head Office. Apart from this, the eligibility requirements must be met.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to The ICFAI University Jaipur?

faqs.question: Can I get admission to The ICFAI University Jaipur with 60% in Class 12?

Selected candidates are also required to pass the personal interview round for final selection.

faqs.question: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?
faqs.answer: CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination isCBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.

The highest international and domestic package offered to MBA students in 2024 stood at INR 20.5 LPA and INR 10.5 LPA , respectively. ICFAI University Jaipur MBA average package offered in 2024 was INR 7.3 LPA . The MBA placement rate recorded in 2024 was 97%.

For BTech , BCA and BSc programmes , the highest package offered during ICFAI University Jaipur placements 2024 was INR 12.5 LPA, INR 8 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively. The number of students placed in BTech, BBA and BCA courses was 2, 32 and 38.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for MBA at ICFAI University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for ICFAI University Jaipur is INR 8 lakh . The fee is valid for two-years. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants need to pay INR 500 as application fee in the start to register for MBA.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BA at ICFAI University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur BA fees is sum of various components. These components are charged either one-time or semester-wise or annually. The total tuition fee for the BA programmes is INR 1.5 lakh . Additionally, the tuition fees for BA LLB (Hons) is INR 4.7 lakh . Students have to pay admission fees or first semester fees to lock their seats. It must be noted that the given fees is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to revision and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: How much does BBA at ICFAI University Jaipur cost?
faqs.answer: ICFAI Jaipur BBA tuition fee is INR 2.8 lakh . In addition, a one-time fee of INR 20,000 is also included in the fee structure. The fees for the integrated BBA course may vary. This fee amount is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

hostel_campus.college_name: ICFAI University Jaipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: ICFAI University, Jaipur provides hostel facility for girls and boys on first cum first serve basis. In addition the University administration helps students to seek a suitable accommodation near by the campus.
facilities: Hostel: The university has hostels for both boys and girls, with AC and Non-AC rooms, with single and double occupancy. There is also a state-of-the-art dining facility available.
Library: The library has 18394 books, 7007 titles, 13 journals and 1 database. There is also a reading room with a seating capacity of over 50 students.
Laboratories: The campus consists of a total of 28 Laboratories, wherein one is a language lab, and the others are laboratories for the engineering students.

Sports and Recreation: The university provides recreational facilities for indoor and outdoor games like Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Badminton, Chess, Carom, etc. The students also get access to a spacious and well-equipped gymnasium, which has A/C and audio facilities. The Gym has separate timings for men and women.

Moot Court and Legal Aid Clinic: These two facilities are for law students. The Moot Court helps students gain practical experience and improve analytical reasoning,  legal aptitude and presentation and communication skills. The Legal Aid Clinic is the way ICFAI Law School contributes to society by spreading legal awareness, legal literacy and by providing legal services. It aims to coordinate with the District and State Legal Services Authorities in solving the disputes of the local people. These initiative aims at making the students independent before they plunge into the competitive professional environment.

library.description: ICFAI University Jaipur  has a  central library and departmental libraries.The library is fully automated and has a huge collection of books.It is functioning on the basis of an 'open access' system.It has a collection of 14000 books and 91 journals.It has well-equipped reading room with seating capacity of over 100 students.
