reviews.review_heading: My college life at ICFAI, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: As I was from ICFAI tech department so there were proper computer labs and other labs like DLD, physics, and chemistry. There was a central library for all departments. There was Wi-Fi in all places on campus. I was a hostel student so I could say that hostels were very good. There were all types of basic needed things available like washing machines, oven, induction, TV room, and sports hall inside hostel. Food was also good if there was any issue related to food sometimes it was solved as soon...

reviews.review_heading: ICFAI Jaipur experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. Hostel, mess, and Wi-Fi are available 24/7 on college campus for students. Hostel are good and we can play any sport we want. We can truly enjoy campus life here.

reviews.review_heading: Strong Placement Record with Excellent Industry Connections.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing ICFAI University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: A Very Amazing University
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good; the labs and computer systems are of the latest generation. The library is very large and contains all kinds of resources. Each student is provided with a personal Wi-Fi password. Very good quality food is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Not a very good college, just average.
reviews.review_text: Most of the amenities were provided in classrooms, like AC furniture, smart devices, Wi-Fi, a computer lab, and a library named NJ Yassy Library. The quality of the QT hostel is not really good. Many kinds of play grounds were on campus, like football, cricket, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. Our college has all kinds of labs like computer labs, AV labs, communication labs, etc. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess is good. Our college has greenery. Our college is under CCTV surveillance. They provide medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is great in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: This university itself has all the facilities, courts have been provided for playing, good suitable environment for studying. Though the edition of the books in library is very old. It should be renewed atleast every 3-4 year. Wi-Fi is provided to each student on their official account created by the institution themselves. It provides great infrastructure, and commendable vice chancellor.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and clean. All laboratories are fully loaded with computers. There is a good quality of food in the mess and canteen. There are good facilities of medical. There is a large sports grounds for football, volleyball, cricket, and basketball in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of The ICFAI University, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the campus is clean. It has AC and computers in labs. The food is very affordable here. We have a large football ground, a basketball court, and a volleyball court. It is nice to visit the campus if you need to.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good in infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with a huge playground and air-conditioned rooms. It has well-settled laboratories and the library is also available. The canteen is also good and reasonable prices are available. The hotel facilities are good and strict. The sports teacher is also strict.

reviews.review_heading: It has good, helpful, and friendly faculty members. Sports opportunities are also good enough.
reviews.review_text: They provide 1000 Mbps Wi-Fi all over the campus. There are 3 labs, and classrooms are big enough and with proper sanitation. We have an average size library with enough books for our study as well as knowledge purpose. Canteen food is good in health and taste. Medical facilities are not good enough but there are many sports like volleyball, football, basketball, handball, cricket, kabaddi, chess, carrom, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college got studies, games, and also in placements. It has a transport facility.
reviews.review_text: There are always neat and clean classrooms. Tables and chairs are also in sequence order. In practical labs, we get all the instruments and chemicals. The library is good. There is one building reserved for the canteen. The Wi-Fi is available on the university campus with a password. There are no sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its teachers and good placements.
reviews.review_text: In our department, the classrooms are very modern and very good. Laboratories are very modern and very high-tech. Library is very good and the condition is very good. In our college, the library is available with a Wi-Fi facility. It provides a canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The infrastructure is pretty good. The college has good speed Wi-Fi. The college provides many opportunities like in games and clubs. Students can join different clubs here. They can also participate in many different activities.

data.description: ICFAI University Jaipur faculty members are highly educated and have decades worth of experience in both academia and industry. The faculty is led by President (VC) Prof (Dr) H. P. Singh, VSM , who is an IIT Kharagpur alumnus and retired Naval Commodore with 30+ years of strategic leadership.   As part of the ICFAI Group, the Jaipur campus utilizes 100% case-based methodology for its MBA program, leveraging a repository second only to Harvard.

Candidate who have obtained 10+2 through Open Universities system directly without having any basic qualification for prosecuting such studies are not eligible for admission in the law courses.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: PUSSGRC is a regional center of Panjab University, Chandigarh.

content.Placements: B.A. LL.B. at PUSSGRC does not have a dedicated placement cell, so direct job opportunities from campus are very limited. Students can take up various internships, moot courts, and research paper opportunities, which the college supports and encourages. These help in building exposure and practical skills, but students themselves have to be proactive in applying to firms, NGOs, or advocates for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are clean and provide basic facilities like furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, and a mess with simple, hygienic food. The environment is safe and suitable for study. Students often face frequent electricity cuts, which can be inconvenient, though backup is usually provided after some delay. Overall, the hostel is decent and affordable, but not very luxurious.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied, but if your rank is very low, then you can go for this college.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is 20%-40%, with the highest package at 25 LPA in 2025 through off-campus placements, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Infosys, Josh Technologies, and Penthera Technologies. No companies are visiting our college for internships. The top roles offered are SWE, frontend, and backend developers.
content.Infrastructure: The hardware and software in all labs are very old and outdated, the Chemistry lab is out of order, and the Wi-Fi is very slow. Hostels have not been renovated in a decade. The sports facilities are lacking. The library is only open five days a week for eight hours. The canteen is available but overpriced.

Application Process

Students interested in getting in Swami Sarvanand Giri Regional Centre, Panjab University need to submit online application for all UG and PG courses atugadmissions.puchd.ac.inoronlineadmissions.puchd.ac.inas per their preferred course. Selection Criteria & Release of Merit Lists

After filling the Punjab University admission form, you need to go through the selection rounds of the preferred course. After the rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are posted on the official website.
Final Admission Confirmation

hostel_campus.college_name: Swami Sarvanand Giri Regional Centre Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: PUSSGRC is a regional center of Panjab University, Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are clean and provide basic facilities like furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, and a mess with simple, hygienic food. The environment is safe and suitable for study. Students often face frequent electricity cuts, which can be inconvenient, though backup is usually provided after some delay. Overall, the hostel is decent and affordable, but not very luxurious.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied, but if your rank is very low, then you can go for this college.
reviews.review_text: The hardware and software in all labs are very old and outdated, the Chemistry lab is out of order, and the Wi-Fi is very slow. Hostels have not been renovated in a decade. The sports facilities are lacking. The library is only open five days a week for eight hours. The canteen is available but overpriced.

reviews.review_heading: UIETH PUSSGRC Hoshiarpur Reviews
reviews.review_text: Classrooms don't have AC. Only the library, CS, and IT labs have it. There’s Wi-Fi in the hostel and academic block. Hostel rooms are okay as expected. Mess food is just eatable. There’s a dispensary for medical facilities open from 9 AM to 1 PM on working days, Monday to Friday. There's an annual sports meet of 3-4 days, which consists of various sports and athletic events. There’s a basketball court, football/cricket ground, volleyball court, badminton court, kho ground, and gym.

reviews.review_heading: My Time at UIET Hoshiarpur: Memories, Lessons, and Growth.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms have well infrastructure with blackboards, smaller and larger benches. The library is well-maintained and required books are always available. However, the library remains open from 9 am to 5 pm and is closed on weekends. For study purposes, the Wi-Fi offers good speed and reach. Apart from this, the labs are well-maintained. The hostel has good infrastructure and a pleasant environment. The food in the mess is good, with a variety of options available, maintaining full hygiene. T...

reviews.review_heading: College have good infrastructure and good placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is quite good, but there is a waiting list for new rooms, which is a big problem for new students. Due to this waiting, all students have to take PG outside college, which is more expensive than college hostel. Other infrastructure is good. There is a dedicated ground for football, volleyball, badminton, basketball, and cricket. But, coaches are not provided by college, which is required.

reviews.review_heading: A college with average infrastructure and facilities and good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are average but sufficient. The quality of the food is good in the mess. Medical facilities are free of cost. Every year, a sports meet is held in which different games are played. The environment of the college is peaceful. Events are organised.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college for students who can't afford high fees and who are determined.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is decent. We have Wi-Fi, 3 IT labs, and one library in our department, which is good. The girls' hostel is good. We have a different mess for girls and boys. The food is good. There are two canteens. Our college provides sports and games facilities like indoor and outdoor games, a playground for badminton, volleyball, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure, faculty, and placements are average, but the environment is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but the speed and range are not good. The library is available but only at college times. Classrooms are not air-conditioned. There are no smartboards or projectors in classrooms. There are only blackboards. There is a small campus which is spread over 10 acres of land for engineering and law students. The girls' hostel is big enough to accommodate all girls, but the boys' hostel is small only for toppers, others have to rent a PG outside the college. The mess food is good and...

reviews.review_heading: The campus is descent teachers don't care about your attendence you get wifi RO water
reviews.review_text: The hotel room are good as compared to other colleges. We have water coolers on every floor and a wifi access in whole campus area but hostel is really small. The college is surrounded by so many PGs which provides room at 2500-?3000 per month. They too have good facilities like RO wifi with speeds upto 1gbps and some also provides fridge. Mess food is pretty decent like all other colleges. They have variety but all food tastes same. I don't know why maybe they use same ready made gray for every...

reviews.review_heading: UIET hoshiarpur college review
reviews.review_text: The classroom of our college is good and wifi is also available everywhere but the campus is small and beautiful. All labs are available here. The quality of hostel is not so good. There are 100 seats in boys hostel and 200 seats in girls hostel and the mess food is below average as compared to other collages and there medical facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Very disappointed with this college and advise you not to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good. The classrooms are okay but not as good as others. All facilities are available here like Wi-Fi, library, gym, in campus hostel, mess canteen etc. But not sufficient seat in boys hostel. From every branch only 4 to 5 boys got hostel. A medical is present on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the placements and location.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a Wi-Fi connection that we can access with our student login credentials. The labs are outdated, so everyone uses their own laptops. The library is pretty good, and you can check out books. This college doesn't have much to do with sports. There is an intracollege sports meet, but it's organized with the help of sponsors that students have to find. There are no certificates, and you can forget about inter-college sports or anything like that.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best return of investment college in india.
reviews.review_text: AC in all the labs. Fully Wi-Fi-accessible campus and hostel. Good hostel rooms and college infrastructure. The quality of the food is awesome. Overall, the combination of AC labs, comprehensive Wi-Fi access, infrastructure, and excellent food make this campus an ideal place for students to thrive academically and personally.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a clean and green campus of PUSSGRC.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is pretty decent; you have an auditorium, classrooms, labs, etc.; the classrooms are well organized and have good infrastructure with Wi-Fi; the classrooms and labs have computers and all the necessary textbooks and software related to the subject; the food here is great in the hostel; medical facilities are available; and there are plenty of sports and grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Best college if you want a good return on investment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is decent. Wi-Fi facility is available in all the classrooms, labs, hostels and the mess. Hostel mess food and the canteen food is better than most of the other colleges, there is a variety of snacks and food available. Hostel rooms are also average. Library is the best thing in the college.

data.description: Swami Sarvanand Giri Regional Centre has an Anti-Ragging Cell. Hence, the freshers will never meet with this problem while studying in this college. The college premises has strict laws against the student found guilty of any act such as abusing, assaulting, threatening, teasing and embarrassment to new students, among others.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur:

college_info.intro: KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur has BTech, MBA and MCA as its popular programme. The College offers these programmes for the duration of 2 to 4 years on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates can apply for these programmes online through the official website. To apply for BTech, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 along with valid scores in entrance exams such as JEE Main or MHT CET. Similarly, for an MBA, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation along with qualifying accepted exams such as MAT, CAT, XAT, GMAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAH CET etc. To learn more about the KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur popular programmes, check out the table given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Repeat the entrance exam instead of taking admission.

review_content.Placements: 90% of core students got placed because TPO is from the electrical department, but 99% of CS, IT, and AI students are unemployed. In total, literally 0 good IT companies visited the college. You won't face many issues till you graduate, but you will face unemployment at the end. It's not even about skills, my extremely skilled friends are also unemployed. I agree that the IT market is currently in a bad state, but that doesn't justify 0 IT companies. Cognizant visited the college in my hometown, which is worse than my college, but not my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but the boys' hostel is horrible. First, it's not on a college campus, and second, from my friends' experience, it's horrible in terms of food and everything else. The labs are old, especially for the IT department, since no higher authority cares about the department. The classrooms are fine. The recent changes made to the canteen make it good. The sports department is not really accessible for everyone, but the ground is good and big. Overall, good for campus life but bad in labs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: KDK College of Engineering is a perfect blend of engineering and college life.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got placed either on-campus or off-campus. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Amazon, HCL, Mphasis, Persistent Systems, and Zensar Technologies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no student Wi-Fi, but labs are available and equipped with wired connection. There are proper classrooms for teaching. The library is equipped with a vast number of books. The food in the canteen is of good quality.

review_summary.college_name: KDK College of Engineering Nagpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KDK College experience can be the best or the worst.

content.Placements: I am a final-year student of CSE, and the placement percentage of our college is very low. Few students get placed in our department every year, and the companies that come for campus placement are not very well-known. Companies that come include Dhoot Transmission, Vedantu, and Venture Capital.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is decent. Our department facilities such as labs, Wi-Fi, and library. Classrooms are well equipped with the latest tools and gadgets. The capacity of our library is 200 students. Sports facilities are available but not very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good and healthy environment for engineers.

content.Placements: Nearly 80 to 90% of students were placed in our college. The highest package provided was 9 LPA, and the lowest package was 2 LPA by different companies. Many top companies were visited at our college including Amazon, HCL, Zensoft, Infotech, and many more. Nearly 80% of students got internships from our course in Amazon, Infotech, and other companies, which offered junior software roles in their company.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available all over the building on our campus. Labs were also well isolated, including proper instruments. Classrooms were also available for different classes, and they had all the facilities there. Library was well arranged, having all the books and also had table to study. Hostel also provided all facilities. Food quality was good in mess and canteen. All types of emergency medical facilities were available. All types of sports and games were played on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Repeat the entrance exam instead of taking admission.

content.Placements: 90% of core students got placed because TPO is from the electrical department, but 99% of CS, IT, and AI students are unemployed. In total, literally 0 good IT companies visited the college. You won't face many issues till you graduate, but you will face unemployment at the end. It's not even about skills, my extremely skilled friends are also unemployed. I agree that the IT market is currently in a bad state, but that doesn't justify 0 IT companies. Cognizant visited the college in my hometown, which is worse than my college, but not my college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but the boys' hostel is horrible. First, it's not on a college campus, and second, from my friends' experience, it's horrible in terms of food and everything else. The labs are old, especially for the IT department, since no higher authority cares about the department. The classrooms are fine. The recent changes made to the canteen make it good. The sports department is not really accessible for everyone, but the ground is good and big. Overall, good for campus life but bad in labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: KDK College of Engineering is a perfect blend of engineering and college life.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed either on-campus or off-campus. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Amazon, HCL, Mphasis, Persistent Systems, and Zensar Technologies.
content.Infrastructure: There is no student Wi-Fi, but labs are available and equipped with wired connection. There are proper classrooms for teaching. The library is equipped with a vast number of books. The food in the canteen is of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Cool environment, but dissatisfied with sports facilities. Placements are average. Good faculty.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students got placed from the last batch, one should focus on their skills regardless of what the college is offering. The lowest package is 4 LPA and the highest is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, TCS, and Wipro. Top recruiters are TCS and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has almost all kinds of facilities, including Wi-Fi, smart boards, and facilities for disabled students, which makes it different from the other colleges.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very excellent, to be honest. They are supportive in all ways and very humble. I can't say whether you become industry-ready because now it is autonomous, so they just brought their syllabus, which is a highly industry-based syllabus. Also, teachers are very supportive whether it's studies or any personal problem.

admission_process.title: KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KDK College of Engineeringadmission 2025is based on entrance exam score. The college offers courses, such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admitted to KDKCE, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers more than 10 courses (including specialisations) in various streams such as Engineering, Management, etc. The application process atKDK College of Engineeringis conducted offline. Read the following article to know more aboutKDK College of Engineeringcourse admission2025.

KDK College of Engineering admission 2025is entrance-based. The college also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, CAT, XAT etc. for admission to specific courses such as MTech, and MBA. Check out the following table for details aroundKDK College of Engineering course admissions2025:

KDKCE courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularKDK College of Engineering courses:
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects (45% for Backward class categories and Persons with Disability candidates)

KDK College of Engineeringis primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at KDK College of Engineering is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: KDK College of Engineering Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates can apply at the official website (https://kdkce.edu.in) for all courses.
STEP 2: Selection
The university considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, CAT, XAT etc for admission to the MTech, and MBA among courses.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theKDK College of Engineering cutoff, aspirants with scores equal to or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theKDK College of Engineering feeto confirm their seats in the university.

hostel_campus.college_name: KDK College of Engineering Nagpur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: KDK College experience can be the best or the worst.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is decent. Our department facilities such as labs, Wi-Fi, and library. Classrooms are well equipped with the latest tools and gadgets. The capacity of our library is 200 students. Sports facilities are available but not very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good and healthy environment for engineers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available all over the building on our campus. Labs were also well isolated, including proper instruments. Classrooms were also available for different classes, and they had all the facilities there. Library was well arranged, having all the books and also had table to study. Hostel also provided all facilities. Food quality was good in mess and canteen. All types of emergency medical facilities were available. All types of sports and games were played on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Repeat the entrance exam instead of taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but the boys' hostel is horrible. First, it's not on a college campus, and second, from my friends' experience, it's horrible in terms of food and everything else. The labs are old, especially for the IT department, since no higher authority cares about the department. The classrooms are fine. The recent changes made to the canteen make it good. The sports department is not really accessible for everyone, but the ground is good and big. Overall, good for campus life b...

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering is a perfect blend of engineering and college life.
reviews.review_text: There is no student Wi-Fi, but labs are available and equipped with wired connection. There are proper classrooms for teaching. The library is equipped with a vast number of books. The food in the canteen is of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Cool environment, but dissatisfied with sports facilities. Placements are average. Good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has almost all kinds of facilities, including Wi-Fi, smart boards, and facilities for disabled students, which makes it different from the other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: If you have good knowledge then you can achieve a good LPA.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure. We have playing ground, Wi-Fi facility, well cleaned pure water, practical labs, cleaned classrooms, library, etc. These facilities are available at this college. Hostel facilities are also available for away students. Mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports facilities, etc., are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with teachers and a good placement rate. It has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. There is a library. Classrooms have an Educomp board, and it is one of the best in Nagpur. KDK College does not have a hostel. However, there are hostels in surroundings. There are all shops like Xerox, cafe and many helpful items.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to take admission in and it is autonomous too.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. Hostel facilities are good. The college maintains cleanliness. The hostel for girls is inside the campus and for boys, it is outside the campus. It is full of safety and security.

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The civil engineering course from KDK College provides all facilities, like Wi-Fi, computer labs, classroom, library, medical facilities, sports, and games. It also provides college bus, etc. College also provides hostel and mess facilities. This is the best college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Well infrastructure and facilities are there. No Wi-Fi is provided to students. Each classroom contains projectors. Computers are also available. Hotel is not good. No good food service is there. There is no cleanliness. No misbehave is allowed here.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent teaching and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really great. Library and classrooms are provided with all facilities. There are very good canteen facilities, medical facilities, and a large ground for sports and games. There are various clubs for games and sports. The mess in hostels is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KDK College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very old. The best part of the college is that there are two buildings on the campus. The first one is the old building with old and strong infrastructure and the second one is the new building with extra services and new infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It has a happy environment of college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available at our campus in specific areas to restrict students from extra use. Labs are well-equipped with the latest software updates on all computers and also have all facilities required for students in labs. Classrooms are also well-settled and students get a healthy environment there. The library is also fully occupied with the books required for all years and semesters of students. The food quality of the mess is quite okay and canteen is also good. Medical facilities are availabl...

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering, Nagpur is a great college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is a computer lab with a full internet connection. Classrooms are fully digitalised. The library is also available in the college. The hostel food is not good and they do not give permission for a holiday. The canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are also vaialbale here.

reviews.review_heading: KDK College of Engineering Review.
reviews.review_text: As of now, I don't stay in the hostel, but according to friends, the food is good. There are 2-3 canteens. The college encourages sports and also organizes the cricket league. The library is digitized. The facilities provided in the hostel are pretty good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I recommend UG students for this college 100%, but Post Graduate, especially MCA, is not recommended

review_content.Placements: 2.27% of students are placed in my course. The package offered in our college: (highest - 7 LPA), (lowest - 2 LPA), (average - 3.5 LPA). Zoho is the top recruiting company for our course. 79.5% of students got an internship (self-placed) in the Software Developer role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is only available for lab purposes, not for our mobile devices. The classrooms are very spacious, but the laboratory was unsatisfactory. They still have 2GB RAM computers. The hostel has 24/7 hot water, medical ambulance, and the food is good. Sports facilities like volleyball, cricket, and basketball grounds are available in our college. It’s a good place for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: An overview of EEE department in AUBIT college .

review_content.Placements: More than 90% of students are placed here in our department. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are mostly Tamil Nadu-based local startups or medium-sized companies. More than 60% of students will do 2 to 3 internships in their college life .
review_content.Infrastructure: We have all types of necessary infrastructure like labs, classrooms, and 3 libraries, but there is no Wi-Fi connection in campus, only in lab. The hostel facilities are below average. Each year, there is a separate hostel. The food there will be also below average. Weekly, 3 times non-vegetarian food is given. On campus, sports are most recognized; we have all types of sports. Also, we have support of faculty for sports.

individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure, and placements.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus is a reputed institute for BCA, MBA/PGDM, B.Voc, After 1th Diploma, UG Diploma, M.Pharma, B.Tech, MCA, M.E./M.Tech, MBBS, MD, MS, D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Animation, Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences, Architecture & Planning, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has a review rating of 3.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus is a renowned institution offering After 10th Diploma, UG Diploma, M.Pharma, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM, MD, MS, D.Pharma, B.Voc, BCA, Ph.D, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Animation, Science, Architecture & Planning. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus boasts an impressive review rating of 3.6 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.79 for Campus Life, 3.26 for Placements, 3.85 for Faculty, and 3.67 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BCA+ MCA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college which has all good quality which is required for any graduation course.

content.Placements: Minimum and average students are placed in my course. Students who pursue different subjects like bio, commerce, and arts are also placed in the same way. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruitment is there in Reliance, Nilon, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs, science labs, and a library for various experiments and educational purposes. Medical facilities are also provided at Shankaracharya Hospital. Sports and playgrounds are also good. A canteen is provided for lunch. Students who are interested in sports can play wherever they want.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is decent, with supportive faculty and departments. It is value for money.

content.Placements: There are placements, but they are not up to the mark when compared to the total number of students graduated. Faculty members promise 100 percent placement when you take admission into this college, but providing placement to even 200 graduates out of 1000 cannot be called 100% placement.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent. There is a separate hostel for freshers and another for seniors, so there is no ragging in this college. You share a room with 2-3 people in the first year, and from the second year, 2 people occupy one room. However, most students shift outside the campus to PGs, flats, etc., after the first year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for engineering.

content.Placements: I am Yash Chandra, studying in SSTC, doing B.Tech in CSE (AIML). I chose this subject because of AI development in the future. The average package was 4 LPA in several companies like Amazon, Microsoft, etc., which is good. You can choose this college for a better future with government jobs if you top this university.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, cleanliness of rooms, the mess food is okay, and the hostel is also good. There are also medical facilities available in our hostel as well as in college, and indoor game equipment is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good. Placements are basic. Academic and cultural is way better .

content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year of college Our seniors get placed this year Basically the percentage of placement in our college is about 60% because most of the students go for GATE exam &startups. The placements are quite normal with a basic package it depends on your skills that how much you are getting paid. The highest package is something around 10 LPA and the lowest is not fixed but a roughly figure is 3LPA. Companies that visit in IT and CS branches for the placement are TCS mostly and sometimes there is google and other multinational companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is quite basic, classroom are average and library is very nice with Wi-Fi facility. Our technical labs are good and have nice internet connection. Overall our infrastructure is quite good and advance. Medical and sports facilities are quite good in our college because our college has ha medical branch also near our campus. Hostal food is good in boys hostal but basic in girls hostel I will prefer for tiffin service for a better health. Our canteen is good for having snacks and lunch good environment and pockets friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I will not recommend this college as it is now overcrowded for B.Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Nearly 10-20% students are placed through campus drives. Salary packages range from 2 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiter is 3M. Around 50% of students get internships in pharma companies for roles such as sales, production, QA, and research. It has scope for more companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, but mostly simple seating, like benches/desks. It also equipped with blackboards/whiteboards, sometimes a projector. Basic ventilation and fans, and AC are limited to seminar halls only. There are different labs for different subjects. There is one life really sufficient for B.Pharmacy. Students have no access to Wi-Fi. I haven't lived in hostel but I have listened to different students who say that hostel food is the worst. There is no specific sports and games period, we only get to play when there is a festival or different pharmacy days.

At Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Architecture and Planning, Science, Teaching and Education and Animation.

cut_off.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 164055 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus MBBS cutoff 2025 was 164055 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 549227 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 2631, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 3569 during Round 2 admission.

This year, in 2025, the cutoff rank for admission to MBBS was 2506 for the General AI category students._x000D_ On the other hand, for the OBC category candidates, the Round 2 cutoff rank for the same course stood at 2255, suggesting that the competition for the General AI category is lower as compared to the OBC category. To view the cutoff details category-wise and round-wise for 2025, 2024, and 2023, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: I'm somewhat dissatisfied because of mediocre teachers, with a low-quality hostel and mess.
reviews.review_text: There are not so good facilities and infrastructure available in this college. There is Wi-Fi on campus, which is decent. The labs have equipment, but some of them don't work. Some computers don't have operating systems, while others may lack keyboard or mouse. Classrooms have dirty benches. The library is decent and has ample books relevant to the course. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is terrible, and it smells a lot in the corridors. The food quality of mess is barely edible, but...

reviews.review_heading: Decent faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, including hostels and laboratories. SSTC provides well-equipped labs for various departments and classrooms are very great. College has a huge library which has massive books collections. They have great hostel and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dents to come to the college .
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and big enough to accommodate all the students. Wi-Fi is available in the college and the library is good, clean and has Wi-Fi. The classrooms are good and are cleaned every day. There are labs for chemistry, physics and computers as well as a workshop.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but not that good because of faculty members and there are no good placements.
reviews.review_text:
1. There is a big library where all the subject books are, and students can read there.
2. In the hostel, there are 2-, 3-, and 4-seater rooms where students can take rooms of their choice. The quality of food is not that of food in the mess and the mess is also not that hygienic. Plates are not washed properly. Food is provided for 3 durations: one is in the morning, that is breakfast, the second is lunch, and the third is dinner at night. No milk is given to any student.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for having a good college life that gives you a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The administration building is not so good, and the hostel is not that great. The classroom blocks are average. Overall, the college is not bad, but it could be better. Tthe rooms don't have air conditioning, which makes it difficult to attend classes in the summer, especially in the hot weather of Bhilai.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average at best the facilities it provides can be better.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in infrastructure of the college is very good and can accommodate very large amount of students but the infrastructure is old and is not much maintained. Labs and classrooms are good and can accommodate up to 50 students 
The quality of hostel is not that good considered that the infrastructure is old it needs to be cleaned and maintained canteen is a mess the food quality is very poor and sports and games are not that much played.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college but could be better.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi available for students. There are various labs including Computer network lab, Internet of Things lab, Database Management System labs, Operating System lab, and Android lab to name a few. The facilities available are terrible. Food is terrible and not edible.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good college in terms of faculty, campus, career, and crowd.

content.Placements: Placement cell is useful, they offer 1:1 guidance to students, and they also have 1 student 1 placement rule, which is basically that if you choose for an in-house placement after your degree from all the positions you apply for, you at least get one.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure, very good classroom, AC is everywhere, projectors are present in all the classrooms, campus is clean, labs are nice too, I personally don't like the chair in the Chemistry lab, but overall, the campus is good, and the library is also there. The canteen food isn't good, I don't like it at all, it feels expensive but is not good in taste, and the canteen also isn't clean. There aren't any sports and games in the Belapur campus, but you can access the Nerul campus if you give your ID card.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Sometimes maybe good, sometimes maybe bad.

content.Placements: The placements are yet to be conducted. The highest package was 2.2 LPA, and the lowest package was 1 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Dr Reddy's and Sun Pharma. 100 percent of students got internships at companies like Reliance, Biocon, and Cipla. The top role offered is quality assurance, Lab assistant, Research professor, and assistant professor.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are as good as they get in a Tier 2 college. Every classroom has an AC. So it's beneficial in the summer. Class is also wide enough to accommodate 60+ students. The laboratories are probably the best part of my college as they include all the necessary equipment, which is often neglected in other labs. There's no hostel in my college.

School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics of D Y Patil (Deemed-to-be) University offers BTech and Integrated MSc (Biotechnology) at the UG level. At the PG level, the DPU-School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics offers MSc in five specialisations. Additionally, SBB D Y Patil offers PhD in Biotechnology and Bioinformatics to research aspirants at the doctorate level. Also, it offers specialised professional programmes and research at graduate, post-graduate, and doctorate levels.

faqs.question: Can I join DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can join DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics (DPBI) directly for certain B.Tech programs, but it depends on the specific programme and the availability of seats. For some programs, DPBI conducts its own entrance exam called AIBTCET (All India Biotechnology Entrance Test), while for others, direct admission is based on merit, considering factors such as your marks in class 12th and other relevant entrance exams.Programs with Direct Admission:•BTech Biotechnology•BTech Bioinformatics & Data SciencePrograms with AIBTCET:•BTech Food Science and Technology•BTech Biomedical Engineering

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics for admission?
faqs.answer: The DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics accepts entrance exam scores for admission to its B.Tech and M.Sc programs. The entrance exam for B.Tech consists of 100 objective type multiple choice questions in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (Botany and Zoology) . The admission for B.Tech is based on the merit score obtained in the entrance exam conducted by the university. Similarly, admission to the M.Sc programme is based on the scores obtained in the last qualifying examination. The recognised national and state level entrance exam scores are accepted for admission to the institute. The specific entrance exams accepted by the university include JEE – Main, MHT – CET, NEET- UG, and DYPCET.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college in terms of faculty, campus, career, and crowd.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure, very good classroom, AC is everywhere, projectors are present in all the classrooms, campus is clean, labs are nice too, I personally don't like the chair in the Chemistry lab, but overall, the campus is good, and the library is also there. The canteen food isn't good, I don't like it at all, it feels expensive but is not good in taste, and the canteen also isn't clean. There aren't any sports and games in the Belapur campus, but you can access the Nerul campus if you g...

reviews.review_heading: Sometimes maybe good, sometimes maybe bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are as good as they get in a Tier 2 college. Every classroom has an AC. So it's beneficial in the summer. Class is also wide enough to accommodate 60+ students. The laboratories are probably the best part of my college as they include all the necessary equipment, which is often neglected in other labs. There's no hostel in my college.

reviews.review_heading: DDynamic learning environment with strong faculty support and excellent industry connections.
reviews.review_text: Wi fi: Campus wide high speed internet connectivity. Labs: Well equipped laboratories for practical training and research. Classrooms: Modern, multimedia-enabled learning space. Library: Extensive collection of books journals and electronic resources.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is the best college in all the aspects.
reviews.review_text: The classes are good and air-conditioned. There are separate labs for the practicals. The campus is big. There is a separate ground for cricket and football. Indoor games are also available like TT, badminton, carrom, chess, etc. The library has various books to study, and it creates an environment to study, and the students love coming to this college.

reviews.review_heading: Fine but not the best. Needs improvement.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is not so good. It's just a building. There are only two lifts which are not enough. Very few things are available in the canteen, Hostel facilities are not available but there are a lot of PGs nearby. 
All the classrooms are spacious and have projectors, labs are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good student life, not so good academically.
reviews.review_text: The biotechnology labs are well-equipped, the engineering lab could be better but now they have new instruments so that's good. The main university has an amazing sports arena and the stadium. The school of biotech doesn't have much for infrastructure other than the labs.

College education facilities are one of the best in Mumbai. There is some lacking in the facilities for the students but overall the education, lab and lab equipments are good. Wi Fi facility is not there. Classes at SBB are interactive with a mix of lectures and presentations. Internal and external exams get equal weightage. There is one mid semester and one semester exam per semester. No handouts are given to students but most teachers share their presentations. content.Placements: Average placements for this subject, you need to work hard, unlike the other courses, faculty members won't give you easy grades, you need a good relationship with the teachers, so you might not get in trouble regarding this course, otherwise, the other courses are totally different.

Also, some companies are looking for an AIML engineer for their machine learning Project. Till now, the highest package offered to the student is 7.5 LPA, and the lowest Package offered is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for college are like old school. There is no AC classroom in entire college, and the wi-fi facilities are not as good as required. The provided library does not have the latest version of the book. Facilities in hostel are good, including a mess and a canteen. Food is also above average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's empowered by education.

content.Placements: For the start of the corporate job, it's a good platform for the placement of freshers and doing well in the growth. Many companies arrive and get students from our college, it starts from 7th semester, or we can also be placed off campus and start growing.
content.Infrastructure: Currently, the renovation of the hostel is done, and further renovation is being done in college infrastructure. It's crease the classrooms and timing. Also renovated the washrooms and every day clean them, and also every day clean the whole college, classrooms, and labs, and keep them shiny.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Lab, classroom, teaching style, and placement need improvement; not worth it for the fees.

content.Placements: In our placements, it is not good. When I visited the college for the first time, I asked about the average package and the highest package. They told me lies; now our placement scenario is very poor. Just approximately 10-15% of students are placed, and the remaining 85% are still not placed, despite 70-75% of companies visiting. The companies do not offer a good package and sign a 2.5-3-year bond with a low amount.
content.Infrastructure: Some courses are good, and many subjects are very old, which are not needed, and the subject scheduling is not good. Good, placement-needed courses are taught late. Hostel rooms are good, and Wi-Fi is provided properly in the rooms. The hostel's mess food tastes okay sometimes, and sometimes not good.

faqs.answer: G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 has been released across various specialisations in opening and closing ranks. G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology BTech cutoff 2024 ranged between2690and38137for the General HS category candidates, wherein BTech in CE is the most competitive course. The easiest BTech specialisation to secure admission in is B.Tech. in Civil Engineering. For a detailed G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology branch-wise cutoff 2024,

faqs.question: How many rounds are there in GUJCET Counseling 2025?
faqs.answer: The admission committee will release the GUJCET counselling session. GD Goenka University cutoff is released annually for the various courses offered by the university. GD Goenka University admission to several undergraduate and postgraduate degrees is offered by either merit or the scores of the entrance exams.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for GUJCET Counselling 2024?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to BTech through GUJCET 2024 scores followed by GUJCET Counselling 2024 must have following documents for the counselling:GUJCET ScorecardClass 12 mark sheetCaste certificate (if applicable)Family Income certificate

faqs.question: What is GUJCET 2025 Counselling schedule?
faqs.answer: The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the finalGUJCETRound 1 Seat Allotment results on the official website at gujacpc.admissions.nic.in. Online payment of token tuition fees and generation of the Admission Letter for R1 is to be held in July.To be held in two rounds, GUJCET Counselling filling and alteration of choices by the candidates for Round 2 is held in the last week of July. Further,GUJCET Round 2 Seat Allotment Listis expected to be released in August.

faqs.question: How to apply for GUJCET Counselling for G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: To apply for GUJCET Counselling inG H Patel College of Engineering and Technology, you need to follow these steps:First, you need to register for GUJCET Counselling on the official website ofAdmission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC).Next, you need to fill your personal and academic details, upload the required documents, and pay the counselling fee.Then, you need to fill your choices of colleges and courses in the order of your preference. You can choose G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology as one of your preferred options.After that, you need to lock your choices and wait for the seat allotment result. The seat allotment will be done on the basis of your GUJCET rank, category, and availability of seats.If you are allotted a seat in G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology, you need to confirm your admission by paying the admission fee and reporting to the college with the necessary documents

description: GCET cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The GCET cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the GCET BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 5382 and 50489 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech in Computer Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same stood at 2690.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech in Computer Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 5382 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech in Mechatronics Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respectively.

G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology, CVM University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to GCET can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

GCET GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.

For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 8893 to 50916. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by . These branches had a closing cut

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.
In the final round for the General HS category, the GCET B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 8893 to 50916, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech in Computer Engineering.

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, good teachers, fewer events, and compulsory attendance.
reviews.review_text: Several hostels nearby. Good food and cheap to get easily. The hostels also have AC rooms, but you need to be prepared for early admission, and Teachers are good teacher, but some of them are strict. However, you get a good amount of knowledge from here.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty is good but sometimes the faculty don't respond you.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is so good, but the college does not provide Wi-Fi. Classrooms are so good. The hostel does not provide drinking water, and mess food is very disgusting. There is no taste, and the only menu every day is potatoes. There are no medical facilities in hostel, and also no sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college atmosphere is good and well-known in Anand city.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for college are like old school. There is no AC classroom in entire college, and the wi-fi facilities are not as good as required. The provided library does not have the latest version of the book. Facilities in hostel are good, including a mess and a canteen. Food is also above average.

Also renovated the washrooms and every day clean them, and also every day clean the whole college, classrooms, and labs, and keep them shiny.

Hostel rooms are good, and Wi-Fi is provided properly in the rooms. The hostel's mess food tastes okay sometimes, and sometimes not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good and bad sides of GCET.
reviews.review_text: G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology has the best facilities for students. There are almost 8 to 9 labs available for programming. All labs have i7 computers with high graphic cards for coding. This college has a two-floor library one floor for reading library books and the other for writing.

reviews.review_heading: Admission to GCET for design-interested students is worth it.
reviews.review_text:
The college is equipped with modern facilities and infrastructure. GCET provides Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus, including in classrooms and labs. The labs are well-equipped with average computers, while the classrooms feature modern smart boards and comfortable seating. The library is spacious and has an extensive collection of books. 

The hostel offers many amenities, including 24/7 true 5G Wi-Fi. The rooms, which are attached to bathrooms and toilets, are adequately furnished for c...

reviews.review_heading: Overview of G H Patel College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. There were canteen facilities for both students and faculty members. There was an auditorium for events, hi-tech practical labs. The hostels were decent enough to stay in, and the mess food was of good quality as well. There were also indoor games facilities and a common ground for outdoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Taking admission in GCET. Worth it or not?
reviews.review_text: There are many labs available in college. Infrastructure is Very good. In library almost 700 800 books are available in my college library. There are many Cell working on Sports, Cultural activity. In Hostel Rooms are Good. Free Wi-Fi available In hostel. Food is average.

reviews.review_heading: STRONG ACADEMICS FACILITIES, BUT PLACEMENT NEED IMPROVEMENT AT G.H. PATEL COLLEGE OF ENG & TECH.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel facilities:

Study table is provided.
24-hour hot water supply and water available.
Mess food is also good in taste, and every 15 days, there will be a fest on Sunday.
Wi-Fi connection in hostel rooms.
Infrastructure available for my department (Information Technology):

Smart boards in classrooms.
Wi-Fi in labs and campus.
Library is also available on our campus.
Auditorium is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Strong Academics, But Placement Needs Improvement at G.H. Patel College of Engineering & Technology.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure available for my department (computer engineering):

Smart board in classrooms.
Wi-Fi in labs and campus.
Library is also available on our campus.
Auditorium is also available.
There is no sports ground available in the college.
Garden is also there.
Canteen quality is average.
Hostel facilities:
Study table provided.
24-hour hot water supply, and water and electricity are also available.
Mess food is also good in taste, and every 15 days, there will be a fest on Sunday.
Wi-Fi con...

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for the current time because many reputed companies are visiting.
reviews.review_text: There are big enough labs and auditorium halls available for many functions. There are many types of classrooms available for each subject’s perpendicular match. Free Wi-Fi is also available in the whole college. There is also good enough food quality at the hostel mess. It also holds many sports games and many more interesting things .

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and good faculty .
reviews.review_text: There are no smart boards in all the classes. And also there is no air conditioning in the all classes. The WiFi in the college building is a little weak. And also our computer labs computers are very slow and old generation computers.

reviews.review_heading: Really need better sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available in college, including Wi-Fi, and the infrastructure is very good. The campus is nice, and hostels are equipped with beds, cupboards, tables, chairs, attached bathrooms, and a mess. The library is good, with a wide variety of books available.

reviews.review_heading: Design students' diaries.
reviews.review_text: The lab consists of AC and Wi-Fi, with each computer having an i7 processor. Classrooms are equipped with smartboards and green boards. The library has a wide range of books and many research papers. Hostels are provided with rooms that include a table, chair, cupboard, and attached bathroom.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nalanda College of Engineering, Chandi.

review_content.Placements: No idea about my branch as it is a new branch in my college. But in other branches, such as CS, a lot of students have been placed on campus and a lot of students have gotten off-campus placements. Average package in on-campus selection is around 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, WireFlow, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, food, sports, medical facilities—everything is available and manageable. The hostel is also comfortable to stay in. The hostel also has separate study areas for students who usually study late at night and very helpful staff.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nalanda College of Engineering, Chandi (Nalanda).

review_content.Placements: 10 students among 60 have been placed in 2024. The highest package is 1.2 Cr. TCS, Infosys, and sales companies are the top recruiters. The campus is 54.5 acres with a fully Wi-Fi-enabled academic building. Hostel for both boys and girls are available within the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: In NCE Chandi, Wi-Fi, labs, library, auditorium, volleyball court, cricket, etc. are on campus. There are 6 branches for B.Tech., namely Computer Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Aeronautical Engineering. There are 4 boys hostels, of which 2 are in construction and 2 are well maintained on campus; 2 girls hostels are in condition and have a capacity of 500. The food quality is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Nalanda College of Engineering - the college Bakhtiyar Khilji needed to burn.

review_content.Placements: Pathetic placement scenario: Only 2-3 companies visit the campus, and those too with sales profiles. You will not be allowed to take offline internships. They don't allow more than 15 days' leave for any kind of internship. You can only rely on yourself for cracking off-campus placements. Even the placement cell is a joke.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is just one single building where all the lectures will be held, and all the administrative chores will be conducted. There's a hostel where you'll find triple-sharing rooms, and even double-sharing rooms after the second year. You can also opt for PG accommodation outside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good, but you have to focus on your self-study. Placement is poor.

content.Placements: Every year, 10-20 percent of students were placed on campus. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest was 3.36 LPA. Local companies (India), not higher MNCs. Almost 70-80% of students got internships from our course, mainly in Bihar start-ups and private companies. Roles include HR, code, assistant developer, developer, and more.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was really unique compared to other colleges. Every department has separate labs, classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The library is combined. Departments/courses have their own labs. There is no medical support, no canteen, only a mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied but still need a lot of improvements.

content.Placements: It depends upon you and your capability. If you need to focus on off-campus, you have to practice coding to get placements, otherwise not. But still, TCS and mass companies come sometimes. But you need improvement in yourself to achieve something.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is good but still needs to improve. There are four hostels. Two for boys and two for girls. Food quality is better than outside mess. A playground is available for cricket, volleyball, and badminton. ATM facilities are available in the college. The overall experience is good. The computer lab is good but still needs some improvements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Nalanda College of Engineering, Chandi.

content.Placements: No idea about my branch as it is a new branch in my college. But in other branches, such as CS, a lot of students have been placed on campus and a lot of students have gotten off-campus placements. Average package in on-campus selection is around 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, WireFlow, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, food, sports, medical facilities—everything is available and manageable. The hostel is also comfortable to stay in. The hostel also has separate study areas for students who usually study late at night and very helpful staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Nalanda College of Engineering, Chandi (Nalanda).

content.Placements: 10 students among 60 have been placed in 2024. The highest package is 1.2 Cr. TCS, Infosys, and sales companies are the top recruiters. The campus is 54.5 acres with a fully Wi-Fi-enabled academic building. Hostel for both boys and girls are available within the campus.
content.Infrastructure: In NCE Chandi, Wi-Fi, labs, library, auditorium, volleyball court, cricket, etc. are on campus. There are 6 branches for B.Tech., namely Computer Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Aeronautical Engineering. There are 4 boys hostels, of which 2 are in construction and 2 are well maintained on campus; 2 girls hostels are in condition and have a capacity of 500. The food quality is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Nalanda College of Engineering - the college Bakhtiyar Khilji needed to burn.

content.Placements: Pathetic placement scenario: Only 2-3 companies visit the campus, and those too with sales profiles. You will not be allowed to take offline internships. They don't allow more than 15 days' leave for any kind of internship. You can only rely on yourself for cracking off-campus placements. Even the placement cell is a joke.
content.Infrastructure: There is just one single building where all the lectures will be held, and all the administrative chores will be conducted. There's a hostel where you'll find triple-sharing rooms, and even double-sharing rooms after the second year. You can also opt for PG accommodation outside the campus.
