reviews.review_heading: Review by Bhanu Pratap Rastogi.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is of top quality with a good academic and administrative blocks, hostels and sports ground. Wi-Fi is also available for all the students free of cost. Labs are also upgraded with the latest technologies and trends. So this college is overall good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are well maintained. The infrastructure of this college is very good. Playground is available for sports like cricket and volleyball. There is a common hall in this college. Hostels are very good.

reviews.review_heading: A college with a good Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is Great. Nalanda college of engineering is spread around 52 acres. Our college has separate hostels for boys and girls with proper structure. Food is also fine in our college although some improvement is still required. Cricket and Volleyball courts are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and provides many opportunities for our growth.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is huge than NIT Patna. We have 4 hostels with many facilities. Our college provides 2 boys hostels and 2 girls hostels. Our college provides facilities like smart classrooms, a computer lab, a well-functional chemistry lab, etc. The electrical and mechanical departments have well-equipped labs. The food served in every hostel is good and provides a variety o food items. You have to opt for either vegetarian or non-vegetarian food items. We have badminton and volleyball ground...

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable and good college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided for every student in our course were very good and the infrastructure was good. Labs, classrooms, and library were well maintained. Hostel facilities were very good. The quality of food served was decent and sometimes, tasty. Medical facilities were poor in our college. Many sports were played in our college like cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: All the faculty members have done M.Tech.
reviews.review_text: A hostel room has 2 beds, 2 tables, 2 chairs and 2 almirahs. Meal provided in the hostel is always good. The registration of hostel is through principals’ assistance. There is a well maintained library in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nalanda College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text:
In this college, Wi-Fi was available, and the speed was 1 Mbps. 
Laboratories were well-maintained. The classrooms were also clean. The library provides several books for clearing B.Tech. The quality of food was not good. The hostel facility was the best because the fee was reasonable. The first-aid box was available, and sports functions were conducted yearly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-maintained library, lab, classrooms, and workshop. The hostel room has two beds, three tables, two chairs, and two almirahs, which are all good for two students. The meals provided are always good. Hostels are always kept clean. There are clean mess facilities and long mess timings so that every student can go at their preferred time.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college fulfills almost all the facilities. It has one of the best infrastructures among all the Bihar engineering colleges. Students will get amused to see the campus. It has free Wi-Fi with decent speed. Laboratories are well-equipped with all the instruments. The classrooms have enough seating capacity and have modern projectors for digital learning. The library is average, students will find all the books related to our course. There are currently 2 buildings for hostels one for boys and...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good in our college, so I gave it 5 ratings and also hostel facility is too good in our college. Many new buildings and other college buildings are in the construction process and I think they should be completed in few months. So, it is a good environment for studying in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and maintenance.

content.Placements: A total of 80 percent of the students got placed from our college. The highest package is 12 LPA, the average is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys and TCS. A total of 85 percent of students got internships from the college, mostly in Accents, etc. The top roles offered are software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, but access is not given to the students. The Wi-Fi is available to the computers in the labs. The library has a wide range of books written by famous authors in the electronics field. The accommodation in the hostel is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty and nice infrastructure.

The top recruiters are Infosys and TCS. The highest offered package is 12LPA, the average is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 5LPA. Almost 90 percent of the students got internships. Top roles offered are Software Developer, etc.

The library has various books related to the core branches, which are written by the best authors. The hostel has a garden to relax in front of the main building. The hostel Wi-Fi is also good, and mineral water is available.

The food is good, but no chicken. The canteen is good with a couple of options. Clean rooms, friendly staff, safe stay, and great value here!

hostel_campus.college_name: Pulla Reddy College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and maintenance.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, but access is not given to the students. The Wi-Fi is available to the computers in the labs. The library has a wide range of books written by famous authors in the electronics field. The accommodation in the hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am an ECE student. The lab facilities are good, and it is open until 7:00 PM. Wi-Fi facility is available for all the systems in the labs. The library has various books related to the core branches, which are written by the best authors. The hostel has a garden to relax in front of the main building. The hostel Wi-Fi is also good, and mineral water is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is good at examinations.
reviews.review_text: Hostel accommodation for the B.Tech boys is available in boy's hostel located adjacent to the college campus. Seats will be filled on first-cum-first serve base. In boys hostel, the fee per year for an ordinary room (common bathroom) is Rs. 70,500. The fee for a special room (attached bathroom) is Rs. 75,500.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, average curriculum, and decent placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped laboratories with advanced technology, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a good library. Infrastructure is well-maintained. Hostels have decent facilities, hygienic mess and canteen food, basic medical support, and good sports and games facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good but education is poor.
reviews.review_text: All are good. When it comes to infrastructure, this is okay; in some blocks, there is no vacancy for classes. The department library is very good. The food is good, but no chicken. The canteen is good with a couple of options. Clean rooms, friendly staff, safe stay, and great value here!

reviews.review_heading: Good placements with supportive faculty, relevant curriculum, and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I am living in the college hostel, everything is fine. The food is so delicious but there is only vegetarian food. They don't provide non-vegetarian food. I don't know what the reason but the vegetarian food is so tasty. The infrastructure also looks good and the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: First thing, the college infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. Though I am a day scholar, my friends always say to me that hostel food is good and very clean rooms with proper ventilation. You can have hostel free study chair from the warden. The only flaw is that there is no chicken or any non veg including egg.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure is too good. Faculty members' teaching is also good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and components are all available. The VLSI lab has free tools like Cadence. The IoT lab has the best components. Everything is good. For the ECE course, there should be more lab facilities for VLSI and for IoT, as maybe our college has few facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2024, good faculty, clean campus, and dissatisfied with the curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were equipped with projectors. Computer labs and other labs were all well-maintained. The college had a vast library with books related to every branch. Wi-Fi was not strong, but it was not so necessary in college. Hostel facilities were very good with all the amenities available. College hostels provided purely vegetarian food every single day. The women's hostel was inside the campus, and the men's hostel was outside the campus. Sports and games were taken seriously. A sports festiv...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for a good future.
reviews.review_text: The college has a Wi-Fi facility for students, which is important while conducting placement drives. It has modern labs with advanced equipment to make us understand the industrial level. The library and classrooms are digital and very useful to students and faculty members. The mess food is hygienic. An emergency medical award with a doctor is available. A sports club is there for students to encourage them in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied because of facilities and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel maintenance is excellent. But in the college, the benches are old, though they are very comfortable to sit on. In the hostel, non-veg food is not provided. Only vegetarian food is available, but they allow bringing non-veg through orders. There are strict rules after 10:00 pm.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are bad in the year 2025.
reviews.review_text: Good not bad. Classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, library okay, and food, mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games all good. Our college conducts Huddan as an event every 2 years. In that many events will be conducted, even sports and dance competitions. Every 2 years annual event also celebrates.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of good facilities, placements, and internships.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, infrastructure is good, there is Wi-Fi, labs, and a library available on my campus. The quality of food is good. My college conducts many extracurricular activities like sports, singing, and dancing so that students can find their real interests.

reviews.review_heading: The deep drive into G Pulla Reddy Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: IN G. Pull Reddy Boys hostel, there are facilities and infrastructure available. The mess is good and provides sufficient food supply to the students, and medical facilities are available in our college. Wi-Fi is available on every floor, and only vegetarian food is available in our boys hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available and the equipment in the lab is also good, but in a few labs, it's not that good, and classrooms are old because it is constructed over 40 years ago. In GPREC we have B.Tech courses and M.Tech are also available. In GPREC, we have a big library for all branches, and each branch has its own library.

college_info.intro:
MANET Pune popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students find ample and good opportunities after completing their education at this college. After completing BSc, students are eligible to be directly placed on board various Indian or even foreign vessels. Students can even rise to the level of Master (Captain) after acquiring the requisite sea time. BSc students can become Navigation or Deck Officers, Engineering Officers, or can take up any job relevant to their field.
MANET Pune BTech students can work on Merchant Ship of Indian or Foreign companies as Junior Engineers after completing this course. Overall, this is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students. faqs.question: Q: What kind of subjects are offered at BSc at MANET Pune?

faqs.answer: MANET Pune course admission criteria are entrance-based for all courses. Students are required to go through IMUCET for final admission. The eligibility criteria is Class 12 in 60% and Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics, minimum 50% aggreagte in English either in Class 10 or Class 12, Passport, Medical fitness certificate from D.G approved doctor.Selection is based on IMU- CET, Personal Interview and Medical Examination.
faqs.question: Q: What is the selection criteria for admission to Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training (MANET)?

faqs.answer: Admissions to the Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training (MANET) are determined by UGC rules, AICTE regulations, and DG Shipping policies. Admission to the full-time MANET BTech (Marine Engineering), BTech (Lateral Entry), and BSc (Nautical Science) programs is determined by the results of the most recent qualifying exam and the IMUCET score. Both residential programs are available from MANET. All applicants must meet further physical, medical, age, and gender requirements in order to be admitted to the academy. MANET has a track record of placements abroad with numerous reputable businesses.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission in MANET Pune?

faqs.answer: After completion of the successful application procedure, the students would need to go through a few steps. Students can check the MANET Pune admission procedure from the points mentioned below:Shortlisting Candidates- 1. Applicants will be shortlisted based on their PCM marks and Medical fitness as per the DGS norms and they will be called to MANET, Pune campus to confirm their admission in the month of June-July (tentatively) 2. Online document verification and admission confirmation will be done through the mail (this might fluctuate later)Personal Interview- Applicants are interviewed (through online/offline mode depending on the COVID-19 situation) by a panel of educators and maritime professionals to assess the applicant’s communication skills, leadership potential, clarity of thought, maturity and reasoning abilities. The panel will also scrutinise the candidate for any extracurricular achievements of the candidate.Medical Examination- Medical doctors appointed by DG Shipping will examine all selected candidates for certifying confirmation with the medical requirements laid down by the Institute.Documents Submission- The candidate needs to submit the list of mandatory documents at the time of admissions

course_faqs.question: Is MANET Pune a good college for BSc?
course_faqs.answer: MANET Pune BSc placements 2023 process is ongoing. A total of 15 students have been placed till now during MANET Pune BSc placements 2023. Earlier, the placement rate recorded during MANET Pune BSc placements 2018, 2019 and 2020 was 100%, 100% and 81.33%, respectively.

course_faqs.question: Does MANET Pune offers scholarship to BSc regular students?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, MANET Pune offers scholarship to BSc regular students. However, the student should have PCM as a compulsory subjects in Class 12 to avail the scholarship. This Scholarship will be awarded only for the First Year of the Programme. The student should maintain all clear results in both the semester of the first year. overview_faqs.question: Is MANET Pune a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MANET Pune is a good college. The college is approved by the Directorate General of Shipping, Ministry of Shipping, Government of India. Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training is a part of the MIT Group of Institutions and is affiliated with MIT ADT University, Pune. The college offers placement assistance to students and the college's infrastructure is quite good.

review_summary.college_name: MANET Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studying and building a career. It has a good placement record.

content.Placements: Almost 93 percent of students got placed in the Maharashtra Institute of Naval Education and Training College. The package offered is 15 LPA. BW, Wilhelmsen, and MOL are the top recruiting companies. Above 90 percent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-maintained classrooms. The hostel is available here. There is a large library with various academic collections of books. Laboratories are also available. In the hostel, there is Wi-Fi in each and every block. Mess and canteen are well-cleaned and maintained. Sports complex is there to encourage students' sports activities. Medical support is also provided. It has the best infrastructure and everything.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good in first structure and good faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement the students get in this MAN College is 80 percent and above. Those who are all clear and good in behaviour will get more chance to attend the interview and get placement. There are many recruiting companies, one of the most is BW Maritime, the second one is Zodiac Maritime, Chellam Shipping Company, Wilhemson.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is very good. Well-experienced faculty members, good practical equipment, and good shipping campus for studying. We can easily learn the things. High-fess by face are available and classroom is very neat. Labs and Library are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Good placement opportunity for the cadets if they fulfil the academic and the company's criteria. Salary packages differ from company to company, and the contract duration. Some of the recruiting companies are BW Maritime, Chellaram Shipping, and Zodiac Maritime.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is well-maintained with Wi-Fi and other required facilities. Grievances are resolved at the earliest. The food quality of the mess is appreciable as compared to other MTIs. Excellent spot and games facilities. Medical facilities are available nearby.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good placement with supportive faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 100% placement. Zodiac, torm tankers, mol recruit. In the course B.Sc. Nautical Science, we got an internship after 3 years of our course from companies like Zodiac, Chellaram, Torm. 90% of cadets got an internship from companies. As a deck cadet, you can go on board a ship from a reputable company.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, we have everything to learn and play, including the time-to-time breakfast, lunch and dinner. Food is clean.
content.Faculty: All the teachers and captains are supportive, and their techniques of teaching are best, also help us to review the entire syllabus. Difficulties of exams are high, but cadets should study regularly so that they can pass the exams too. 80% Passing. What we're studying is totally related to our field, including the studies and activities. MANET provides both B.Sc. and B.Tech courses for seafarers, and both have their classrooms and workshops, as well as the ship experience on campus, which gives a more realistic view and full support of faculty members and captains.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2025. Many companies are coming to our college.

content.Placements: Out of 115 cadets, almost 55 cadets are already placed in our batch. Out of 100 cadets, 60 cadets are already placed in many of the companies. Still, not been told about the packages. 60 cadets got internships in cell ship, torm tankers. Overall, the placement performance of our batch is positive. These internships helped cadets and students to gain practical knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The quality of the food is very good, and the classroom has well-advanced equipment. We have a sports complex where we can play any of the sports. In the mess, we get hygienic food compared to other colleges. The hospital is near our college, so if there is any emergency, we have medical facilities.

admission_overview.title: MANET Pune Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training (MANET) admissions 2025 are based on DG Shipping, AICTE norms, and UGC guidelines. MANET Pune offers BTech (Marine Engineering) and BSc (Nautical Science) programmes. The courses are delivered in full-time mode. Admission is based on the score of the last qualifying exam and the IMU CET score. Specialisations are available in Marine Engineering and Nautical Science. Candidates seeking admission to MANET Pune can pursue their careers in the Merchant Navy.

admission_process.title: MANET Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: After completion of the successful application procedure, the students would need to go through various steps. Applicants who are seeking admission to MANET and want to pursue their career in Merchant Navy field can check the MANET Pune admission procedure from the points mentioned below:
Step 1: MANET Pune Application:Candidates must register and appear for the entrance examination before applying for admission.

Step 2: Shortlisting Candidates:Applicants will be shortlisted based on their PCM marks and Medical fitness as per the DGS norms and they will be called to MANET, Pune campus to confirm their admission in the month of June-July (tentatively). or Online document verification and admission confirmation will be done through the mail (this might fluctuate later)

Step 3: Personal Interview:Applicants are interviewed (through online/offline mode depending on the COVID-19 situation) by a panel of educators and maritime professionals to assess the applicant’s communication skills, leadership potential, clarity of thought, maturity and reasoning abilities. The panel will also scrutinise the candidate for any extracurricular achievements of the candidate.
Step 4: Medical Examination:Medical doctors appointed by DG Shipping will examine all selected candidates for certifying confirmation with the medical requirements laid down by the Institute.
Step 5: Documents Submission:Candidate needs to submit the list of mandatory documents at the time of admissions

college_info.college_name: MANET Pune Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education & Training offers scholarships to undergraduate students as financial assistance. The college offers five types of scholarships to students. The below-mentioned table reflects on the scholarships offered by MANET Pune:
12th (PCM): Entry-Level Scholarship
Diploma Candidates: Entry-Level Scholarship
Download the MANET Pune Scholarships Brochure
